name: Johnny for Congress
subject: Unfiltered Conservatism is Back
body:
PRESS RELEASE For Immediate Release: March, 2022 Contact: Tristan Mouradian-Campaign Director Tel: 818-480-8333 E-Mail: tristanj4c@votejohnn
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/9eNzTDhYj/c?w=rUF9w9DFR4ZLhMwQV8MtQVnoJxsda41rsBJv9ZX7-uM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzllTnpURGhZaj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjhlYThiZWI5LTExODktNDUxZi1hZTU1LWQwZTkwMDRiN2JjMyJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | "Unfiltered Conservatism is back in the 30th Congressional District of California, USA"
---
| | PRESS RELEASEFor Immediate Release: March, 2022Contact: Tristan Mouradian-Campaign DirectorTel: 818-480-8333E-Mail: [tristanj4c@votejohnny.us](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/9eNzTDhYj/c?w=QKvqHn50LSqai6qRFRdQfPepsTHZAci-BBsqPwcatzs.eyJ1IjoibWFpbHRvOnRyaXN0YW5qNGNAdm90ZWpvaG5ueS51cyIsInIiOiJjNjI5ZTI5YS1iZmQ5LTRmN2UtODhjNi1iNWJjZmM1MDE1NGMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4ZWE4YmViOS0xMTg5LTQ1MWYtYWU1NS1kMGU5MDA0YjdiYzMifQ) Los Angeles, CA – Johnny J. Nalbandian, a very patriotic American of Armenian descent who was born in New Jersey, USA, and grew up in and lives in California’s 30th Congressional District is running for United States Congress. Johnny fell in love with American politics at the age of five when he watched the Kennedy-Nixon debates on live black & white television. He looked up to both candidates with great enthusiasm. Known as “Johnny” to his colleagues, Nalbandian founded a successful California-based seafood distribution and processing company at the age of 19. His company soon became a leader in the seafood industry not only by instrumentally moving premium restaurant-quality seafood into supermarkets but also running pilot programs for the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) HACCP program. At its peak, the company had $60 million in sales and was known as “The Tiffany’s of the Seafood Industry”. Nalbandian, who was labeled as the “Seafood Marketing Genius” by Sandy Gooch, pioneer of the Natural Food Movement and mentor to the Whole Foods Family, has become a successful and highly demanded food industry professional. He was offered the position of Fish & Game Commissioner by California 1982 Governor-Elect George Deukmejian’s office. For the past two decades, Johnny has advised businesses of all industries and sizes regarding expansion, trade, and investment opportunities. Also known as Mr. Seafood, Johnny has had guest appearances, speaking engagements and seminars where he appeared as industry spokesman on CBS, ABC, NBC, FOX TV News and KFI radio. Also, for over four years he appeared on the Jackie Olden Radio Talk Show and The Larry Lipson Restaurant Show on KGIL. Additionally, as a well-known authority and national representative of the Seafood Industry, Johnny helped raise thousands for other charity functions such as hosting benefits for Jerry’s Kids, Autism International Foundation, LA Dodger’s – Think Cure Cancer Foundation, Las Vegas Chef’s Project Chef and Kids and Children’s Nature Institute just to name a few. Johnny missed the California he grew up in, especially after he watched the radical Democratic Party destroy this once-Golden State, essentially turning it into a one-party system. His goal is to bring back real conservatism to LA County. He strongly believes that he can bring back business growth and prosperity to the 30th congressional district, where he currently lives, and enrich our community and families. It is vital to prevent further deterioration which has plagued many democrat-run cities nationwide. Johnny and his staff have created two platforms to address the important changes needed on both a local and national level: the “[Contract with our Community](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/9eNzTDhYj/c?w=uOmasV_4fz9AxeJY9mpYRQCWR_NK1wuc4oNlovb6fDY.eyJ1Ijoidm90ZWpvaG5ueS51cy9jb21tdW5pdHkiLCJyIjoiYzYyOWUyOWEtYmZkOS00ZjdlLTg4YzYtYjViY2ZjNTAxNTRjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiOGVhOGJlYjktMTE4OS00NTFmLWFlNTUtZDBlOTAwNGI3YmMzIn0)” and “[Platform of Liberty](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/9eNzTDhYj/c?w=sq6wQoWJumg4ko3Ow-BVv40WeSo8iZR7T_eslgzvXeQ.eyJ1Ijoidm90ZWpvaG5ueS51cy9uYXRpb25hbCIsInIiOiJjNjI5ZTI5YS1iZmQ5LTRmN2UtODhjNi1iNWJjZmM1MDE1NGMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4ZWE4YmViOS0xMTg5LTQ1MWYtYWU1NS1kMGU5MDA0YjdiYzMifQ)”.
The current state of SoCal communities is not sustainable nor acceptable. It is Johnny’s major goal to always protect and support parents as well as our future generations. Using his skills as a businessman, he will make the 30th a flagship district in achievement and success.

clean_body: PRESS RELEASE For Immediate Release: March, 2022 Contact: Tristan Mouradian-Campaign Director Tel: 818-480-8333 E-Mail: tristanj4c@votejohnn | | Can't see this message? | | | | | "Unfiltered Conservatism is back in the 30th Congressional District of California, USA" | | PRESS RELEASEFor Immediate Release: March, 2022Contact: Tristan Mouradian-Campaign DirectorTel: 818-480-8333E-Mail: Los Angeles, CA – Johnny J. Nalbandian, a very patriotic American of Armenian descent who was born in New Jersey, USA, and grew up in and lives in California’s 30th Congressional District is running for United States Congress. Johnny fell in love with American politics at the age of five when he watched the Kennedy-Nixon debates on live black & white television. He looked up to both candidates with great enthusiasm. Known as “Johnny” to his colleagues, Nalbandian founded a successful California-based seafood distribution and processing company at the age of 19. His company soon became a leader in the seafood industry not only by instrumentally moving premium restaurant-quality seafood into supermarkets but also running pilot programs for the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) HACCP program. At its peak, the company had $60 million in sales and was known as “The Tiffany’s of the Seafood Industry”. Nalbandian, who was labeled as the “Seafood Marketing Genius” by Sandy Gooch, pioneer of the Natural Food Movement and mentor to the Whole Foods Family, has become a successful and highly demanded food industry professional. He was offered the position of Fish & Game Commissioner by California 1982 Governor-Elect George Deukmejian’s office. For the past two decades, Johnny has advised businesses of all industries and sizes regarding expansion, trade, and investment opportunities. Also known as Mr. Seafood, Johnny has had guest appearances, speaking engagements and seminars where he appeared as industry spokesman on CBS, ABC, NBC, FOX TV News and KFI radio. Also, for over four years he appeared on the Jackie Olden Radio Talk Show and The Larry Lipson Restaurant Show on KGIL. Additionally, as a well-known authority and national representative of the Seafood Industry, Johnny helped raise thousands for other charity functions such as hosting benefits for Jerry’s Kids, Autism International Foundation, LA Dodger’s – Think Cure Cancer Foundation, Las Vegas Chef’s Project Chef and Kids and Children’s Nature Institute just to name a few. Johnny missed the California he grew up in, especially after he watched the radical Democratic Party destroy this once-Golden State, essentially turning it into a one-party system. His goal is to bring back real conservatism to LA County. He strongly believes that he can bring back business growth and prosperity to the 30th congressional district, where he currently lives, and enrich our community and families. It is vital to prevent further deterioration which has plagued many democrat-run cities nationwide. Johnny and his staff have created two platforms to address the important changes needed on both a local and national level: the “” and “”. The current state of SoCal communities is not sustainable nor acceptable. It is Johnny’s major goal to always protect and support parents as well as our future generations. name: Tawnya Arview
subject: What if...?
body:
It's time to put Godly people in elected offices!

| What if, Peter? Tim just got off the stage at a packed house in Hamilton County where people are fired up about the idea of sending men and women of God to fill our government offices! **[Will you help make sure Tim gets elected to the U.S. Senate?](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYnzDxJtkM3BSrLjtBsDA6KDl0JS9THzn9RAh_1FqZYvPaa8TmqmwVsaAo7VlBtUutw&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_if_fundraiser&n=1)** We need real conservatives like you, Peter, to help us change the direction of our state and our nation. Tim's fighting hard to make sure people know he is a Christian first and foremost. He believes that every life should be valued, including and especially the unborn. He believes in the Second Amendment and your right to keep and bear arms. And Tim believes in hope. Hope for all of us. Hope for our future. [**Please donate today so that this message of hope is spread far and wide in our great state!**](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYnzDxJtkM3BSrLjtBsDA6KDl0JS9THzn9RAh_1FqZYvPaa8TmqmwVsaAo7VlBtUutw&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_if_fundraiser&n=2) Thank you so much and God bless you, Tawnya P.S. Peter, we're really under the gun here! Any dollar amount can help us [get Tim to the Senate](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYnzDxJtkM3BSrLjtBsDA6KDl0JS9THzn9RAh_1FqZYvPaa8TmqmwVsaAo7VlBtUutw&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_if_fundraiser&n=3) where we can turn the hearts of the people back to God! Sent from my phone
---

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Direct Attacks. Senator Kennedy’s under attack.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5sjh2h7r61rklcqpb63t766721r7lkojk10q4ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm2ob6cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sdgsso68sr2m9i60phlc2r75crme8o60oticsqbcs35mormadjjm1iecdb0ccrrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ao5lmgrr4t366lhb6phnm2qmash5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh7eptitmrlduk9nj6124j5indng29ia7s7f8rtg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm2ob6cph2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zshfs9edaf56fjgrmt9q5m0l4qm7ik7oi6t2kb2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm2ob6cph2bs)[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8rqdci8jjnqp6h0kb2eb3bjoqdknpp00eonbui0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm2ob6cph2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zstaofbnjs050go02dmp24e8p6p72ui5phour59o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm2ob6cph2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmpi9g54ugsff4n8rnb2imqgst71gcecigbvkfs0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm2ob6cph2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Fellow Patriot,

The American Truckers Freedom Convoy is UNDERWAY! Two of our convoys have launched and more are set to get rolling in the coming days.

ALERT: I watched Biden's State Of The Union and it made it more clear than ever that we must TAKE BACK THE SENATE and defeat the failing Biden agenda. **[CHIP IN NOW >>](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf5u6ekvblfpb55j03r96s2jeg30kh20k6h80ivo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm2ob1c9h2bs)**

Friend, President Biden has been in office for only a year and he's already done so much to destroy this country.

* He's eliminated American energy independence.
* He's spending so much money we don't have that the dollar is becoming worthless.
* The cost of gas is up 40%!
* Our border is in crisis.
* His weakness on the world stage is leading to GLOBAL CONFLICTS.
* He's nominated a radical progressive to the Supreme Court.

_And in his State of the Union address, he promised to do MORE OF ALL OF THAT!_

We cannot allow this failing agenda to continue. We must TAKE BACK THE SENATE and put America on a better path NOW!

subject: Weekly Newsletter from Leader Rob Ortt

body:
Sunday, March 6th Edition

Best, Rob

---
Senate Republicans: End the State of Emergency
---
Senate Democrats REFUSED to take up Republican Leader Rob Ortt's Resolution to END the Emergency Declared by Governor Hochul
On Tuesday, New York State Senate Republican Leader Ortt demanded to know why the Senate Democratic Conference refused to take up his resolution to nullify the Governor's recent February 14th Executive Order declaring a "disaster" emergency in the state of New York. The resolution would have put an end to Governor Hochul's statewide disaster declaration that was done unilaterally and without input from the Legislature. Today, Senate Democrats failed to either debate the resolution or put it to a vote.
"Democrats are pulling out all the stops to hold onto power. This never-ending 'state of emergency' has left local governments, small businesses, and everyday New Yorkers frustrated and angry with state government. New Yorkers want to move forward and we deserve to know why Senate Democrats refuse to even discuss the issue. Democrats' refusal to take up our resolution to end the Governor's executive order exemplifies the problem: the Legislature is no longer a co-equal branch of government. My colleagues are in lockstep with the Executive Office exactly as they were during the Cuomo Administration," said Leader Ortt.
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y-3jWPuA1tIJnBQUwZsa06tW94wchHi5RyUgHZDjg0sgo3ZxeR3056S51A33u3WoHgh4jd2bLh9m2tuTqCyiJruva8fZKVanmWPrX_rjij5RKzrS-cljeEsZq5WuGa8GQf-R1W1yNBDQRqDS2IrEgYIKGRvs9O11z7befCdbdmTZYLyObuYPllAQbazq6qctY-iLCf3aw7Qs3jpAXZO67g==&c=vtA56s19-ES-8gNshWtjG02Lp9MA7_ZjERu7FvRBdRprUREJ7dX-TQ==&ch=f0W0zZw8SF87GIT7BIukKV9FG0ywEaOwnGsRH9kYSkYPW1FfKGsmLA==)
---
| Senate Republicans Urge Public to Reject Albany's Plan to Hike Energy Costs
---
---
As Inflation, Gas Prices, & Energy Bills Hit Record Highs & Climate Action Council Pursues Natural Gas Bans, Republicans Urge the Public to Get Involved in Comment Process
On Wednesday, The NYS Senate Republican Conference called on all New Yorkers to get involved and submit official public comment on the Climate Action Council's (CAC) draft Scoping Plan and radical efforts to eliminate reliable, affordable sources of energy.
Natural gas hookups and services, as well as those from propane and heating oil, are vital for New Yorkers - especially in rural communities and during harsh winters - and cutting off these dependable sources of energy would be costly to residents and businesses and ineffective on a global scale.
"This Energy Affordability Crisis, fueled by the failed policies of One-Party Rule, is unaffordable, unforgiving, and unsustainable. The former administration and now Governor Hochul's administration are trying to rid the state of critical energy infrastructure sources such as natural gas hookups, which will only worsen the problem.
"This will be ultimately unaffordable for every day, common-sense New Yorkers, leaving them in the dark and in the cold. That's why it is essential that we make our voices heard and call out these unrealistic 'climate' plans, which will only further burden our communities," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt.
---

| Women's History Month A Personal Note from Rob Ortt
It's Women's History Month! I'm excited to announce a great woman-owned business right here in Senate District 62. Nasreen Akhtar is the owner of Naz716 Business & Cultural Center in Niagara Falls. Ms. Akhtar immigrated from Pakistan and started the Business & Cultural Center to inspire other women and small business owners to build their business and display various cultures throughout the community.
Naz716 provides various resources under one roof! And, did you know? Naz716 provides a professional working environment where stakeholders and clients can comfortably explore and discuss their creativity, passion, and success anchored to the values of connectivity, collaboration, and productive co-working & cultural values.
Located at 6951 Williams Road, Naz716 holds 20 office spaces available to lease on a daily, monthly, or annual basis with two conference rooms, a waiting & lobby area, and a break room.
We are lucky to have Ms. Akhtar as a member of our community. Her businesses will be having an event every month until June and I hope you get the opportunity to check it out and support our local business owners.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z700c345uvqof9a64r497e9mrtrk5n3jdqaubrk0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqn6ob765h3cslkcco6ad9mcdjb1pphccpj8pjnc2r67d346gp6fd70sup36dr76v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj33c5lmhjrcoj66aob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5hmaor0s1h69oh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z65d29njt0da9t9vp5jdpunkp5lggjhm0a0jvd4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm1o32cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0710bplogqd4l25gponpso0e2o4vlr8a59j8qng_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm1o32cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znti0lnl525a02pn4dtph99od0aqrn0l5lir87d8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm1o32cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: Lost my Primary

body:
Friend, this isn’t how I thought today would go... Instead of coming to you with the good news that I was nominated to repres
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoqu85gtdd5valb9j2fm208rtvfrgj84blv55igg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm9o71c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongspib0s33chp30stic5h64cpgcoobeolksuq68dhlehqm9dlic2qm7c5gmcoefduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4dj666obbd77mti6cdb0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)

Friend, this isn't how I thought today would go... Instead of coming to you with the good news that I was nominated to represent the most MAGA-strong district in the nation, I'm coming to you with this terrible news: **AOC, BERNIE SANDERS, AND OTHER RADICAL LEFT-WING POLITICIANS PROMISE TO FLIP TEXAS AND AMERICA BLUE** Reading this headline made my stomach churn. I barely made it to election day before my campaign funds went dry. Fighting off Beto in 2021 nearly ran me into the ground... And now, I have nothing left in the tank to beat the uber-wealthy socialists AOC and Bernie Sanders. The thought of losing to them makes me physically ill. They'll destroy this country. **The only thing that 's allowed me to remain President Trump's #1 Ally in Congress has been the support of America-loving Patriots like you. ** But I won't last 1 day against these Socialists... I have to reach each and every one of my fundraising goals. Thankfully, President Trump has authorized ONE MORE DAY for me to do that. Please, I'm humbly asking you: [**Can you chip in $25, $100, or even $250 before midnight to GUARANTEE a crucial early victory for President Trump and the GOP?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7662d0sna9rnu3ib8eqi387tt4ms5tui4mvov7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm9o71c5h2bs) [**RUSH $25 BEFORE DEADLINE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zguhglkbshvlbu5jvmrs9ppnah2s04rhjiq4ohig_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm9o71c5h2bs) [**RUSH $100 BEFORE DEADLINE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhsbp0it310jmrlikqr61fmfj0a9m9np0r43gi48_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm9o71c5h2bs) [**RUSH $250 BEFORE DEADLINE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlmqrhkt5inqls6ru23ocg7i31s5tuislne7b6eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm9o71c5h2bs) [**RUSH ANY AMOUNT BEFORE DEADLINE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl931ma9r83ndr0pngjinvoq5fgur1jhe82670jo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm9o71c5h2bs) AOC and Bernie think they have me in the bag... What they don't know is that I have the support of Pro-Trump Conservatives like you, Friend. Our Republican Majority is in serious danger of being lost. Nancy Pelosi knows that THIS RACE is the only thing keeping our hopes alive. If we can hit this fundraising goal by midnight tonight, me, Donald Trump, and the ENTIRE MAGA MOVEMENT will be grateful. Please, Trump needs me in office. He needs me to win this race. [**Will you make sure I have the resources to do that?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrvl9r3bm0tfpvfnd6911mq84b9ton8r7e4sih40_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clhm9o71c5h2bs) Thank you for your support, Ronny Jackson | Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson

name: Pro Life Update
subject: "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."
body:
Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today woul
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvrnergkfq2pgavvir0p6pmjbeq25q0v17maoaqg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2upqncojiesp7bcb5mcr69odim6qr6sblcpobeo3ncmqe9dtkmtgn5d77m2om2dpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlc2qr8c3ie5j32cljcgrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cdimep33cpim49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z91l271cksc5ptt79j1b197uufon3j0cmd7qq380_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cljm8or6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn’t recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you’ve ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoq058tq277v9ig514tuiutq10b0eg40nu0mtvk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cljm8or6clh2bs)
---
| | That’s because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we’re releasing our newest free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. ** **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course—it’s truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College’s mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can’t make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach.** [_**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” at this secure page »**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbjmh8b1chg7n02ad9ik1o3k3nitcgho7k3vcveo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cljm8or6clh2bs) __ Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

---

Hope you're kicking off a great Sunday morning . Keep an eye on the weather today. It's slick on the roads. A quick reminder - I still have a handful of slots open on my calendar for anyone who wishes to connect virtually for some one-on-one time. If you're taking a pass this round, maybe you could let your friends know that I'm open to a meeting? Feel free to share [my calendar.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42635705/333698558/-153742824?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTAyMWYyYi00ZTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uICcymHkUk2kr3Uc8TuO2QLJXjBntXbBcTMzT80NCbY=&emci=594b1c04-3d9d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8e021f2b-4e9d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) I'm happy to talk with **_anyone_** who has a question, concern, or feedback on my run for Congress. It's not always easy to reach a rural citizen digitally these days, but on top of our two dozen recent town halls, I'm trying to be very accessible. Digital accessibility is a big deal. On several occasions, I've been on Zoom calls or virtual town halls in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula, and sure enough, someone in the middle of sharing a concern got disconnected. But the problem isn't just chatting with our friends. This is a serious infrastructure issue. For **six years** now, our current representative promised the district he would work to expand broadband services in our rural communities. Over half a decade later, still nothing. In fact, he continually votes against it. The _**Bipartisan**_ Infrastructure Bill sets aside $65 billion to improve America’s spotty broadband system. Along with funding for the Soo Locks and local roads and bridges, my opponent adamantly opposed government funding for rural broadband. I will push for this initiative and similar ones like it because**68% of people living in rural areas of tribal lands still don't have access.** Another report indicates the real number may be even higher. My opponent says he's been trying to invite broadband expansion to the area since he took office, but he exclusively concentrates on attracting private corporate investment. Although there’s a role for private enterprise, **all his efforts failed.** At a local level, rural broadband can give citizens access to their government, emergency alert systems, **weather updates** , and keep important infrastructure running. It also significantly improves our students learning. Rural broadband can assist our daughters in pursuing their passions in STEM programs to become engineers, scientists, and world leaders. It can help our sons realize their dreams of studying international business and communicating around the globe. Access to consistent, reliable internet also enables First District residents to work from home, which positively transforms our economy and attracts opportunity and investment to the area. At a state level, the infrastructure bill provides $100 million to extend broadband coverage and provide nearly 2.5 million low-income Michigan households the opportunity to apply for funds to help afford internet access, a goal I champion. **No child should have to sit outside a fast-food restaurant to connect to wifi to do their homework.** Approximately 1.2 million households, many of which are in the district, do not have a permanently fixed broadband connection. This is unacceptable. Can you **[pitch in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42635706/333698559/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTAyMWYyYi00ZTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uICcymHkUk2kr3Uc8TuO2QLJXjBntXbBcTMzT80NCbY=)** today to ensure we win this election so that I can stand up for the real needs of rural Michigan? Let's take this seat back and finally get citizens connected to the 21st century. – Dr. Bob

But, when we're not on the same page as our readers, we've already sent our least favorite kind of message.** **So, we take ample opportunity to highlight that you may opt out if you feel you've received our e-mails error. I'm confident I can be an influential member of Congress for the First District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. I genuinely care about every one of you, whether you are a democrat, republican, or independent. If elected, I will strive to be the voice for all district residents. My family, friends, and staff have put everything we have into turning our vision of this great state into a reality, and we will continue to work towards achieving that objective. Every day, we build and strengthen partnerships with voters and citizens alike who align with the vision we want to bring to the United States and Northern Michigan. I particularly love meeting and working with the younger generations. They are the voice of the future and are very active and enthusiastic in learning how to be involved. The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. So, it's time to unite, and it's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities. The type of location data we collect depends on several factors, including the type of device you are using (e.g., laptop, smartphone, tablet) and the type of connection enabled on your device (e.g., wifi, Bluetooth, broadband cable). Our Apps or other services features may rely on this location information to provide certain location-based services, such as our promotional offers, merchandise offers, event information, or other Save America-related content that may be of interest to you. We may also use location information to improve the functionality of our Apps and our other applications and services. If you do not wish to have this location information collected and used by us, you may opt out by disabling the location and Bluetooth features on your device and/or in our Apps. As a general note, you may choose not to provide certain information, but you may not be able to access certain content or take advantage of certain features of the Services. subject: I’m in danger.

body:
It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi7e5liuir6o5q8mj38ub6pcu8m3p3riatp2bh4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cljmaoj2c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tjmmcob6s33c4q78dlieop64s9k65jj9obielrjatb4s3jr4sr1e9oe0p1lmso6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ao5lmgo74tb66jgb6p37m2qmash5u)
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmdpun58b7l0i87idp8f70ljri2irflrbv41nmv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cljmaoj2c3h2bs)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **
| | [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $500 DONATION](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsjjen5s6n2euhavaqlg2o70qjk7tjvc21smglh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cljmaoj2c3h2bs)

name: American Action News
subject: They’re “canceling” patriotism
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hill
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg1jqh16389pr6ddjdib16pt17559km49g30ev5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cljmaoj2clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1p9hmgp76pjnm9rj4pblmtjm9d5nchge0sb26dj32s77mppm3dhgmhjb8spkm1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm1ddk61p7aphks2pm8dtgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoto0ts22efhqqq8mpa3v6394h59p32q50nsvr90_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cljmaoj2clh2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs8oqvc6762qboeqv20pojo3ah4hkv5rnn2embs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cljmaoj2clh2bs)** Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several recent polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I _mprimis_ ...for life).
* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.
* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”
* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd2ha7msogr8prd1lmjje8ebfkfh4e0c7i12s26o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cljmaoj2clh2bs)** After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

Hillsdale College,33 East College St, Hillsdale, MI, 49242, USA
---

Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away. After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth. It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as The New York Times ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is reaching and teaching millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. Your generous support today will... Expand the circulation of Imprimis , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I mprimis ...for life). Send millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution. Increase the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.” Launch and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens. One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support. Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below: After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost. Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Hillsdale College,33 East College St, Hillsdale, MI, 49242, USA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3mpea--fgxr-4qqlpo9&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children’s future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn’t good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama’s extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama’s administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife’s—we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats’ complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government’s failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans’ lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address—unifying and healing America—it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else’s fight, this is our fight, and it’s a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I’d like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don’t feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing—truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don’t want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn’t your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven’t made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don’t expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Fellow Conservative, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mpea-21o93-4qqlpo3/ "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mpea-21o94-4qqlpo4/)
---
| Fellow Conservative, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mpea-21o95-4qqlpo5/ "Please click here to donate now")**

Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address—unifying and healing America—it feels as if our nation is being torn apart. As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else’s fight, this is our fight, and it’s a fight we absolutely must win. I believe America is in peril. Much as I’d like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don’t feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing—truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don’t want you to hear. In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn’t your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven’t made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don’t expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail. Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win. So I will humbly ask, Fellow Conservative, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA. | | | "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON" Thank you, Ron Johnson | | | | | Fellow Conservative, It’s Ron Johnson. I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate. I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster. This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to SAVE AMERICA from the Democrats. "Please click here to donate now"** | | | "SAVE THE SENATE" | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc. PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159 Text RonJon to 47682 for mobile alerts! If you would prefer to donate by mail, please send your contribution to the following address. RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC. PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159 6890 E. So I'm coming to you personally, friend: = Senate control hinges on what happens here in Florida, and we have a real chance to flip this seat blue. Florida's last senate race was one of the closest in the country. That's why Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are spending millions to defeat me and prop up Marco Rubio. If I'm going to have the resources to win, I must reach my midnight goal. The next donation could be the one that closes my fundraising gap. So with polls showing Marco Rubio and me neck and neck, I've got to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much for your support, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Geoff Diehl Announces Policy Priorities and "Berkshires to Boston Tour"
body:
| | | |
---
DIEHL ANNOUNCES STATEWIDE "BERKSHIRES TO BOSTON TOUR"
---
|
---
| Geoff Diehl, Republican candidate for Governor, announced today that he will be traveling across Massachusetts over the next few weeks to greet voters and discuss local and statewide issues as part of his campaign for Governor.
According to Diehl, he plans to visit towns in every county of the state under his newly-unveiled "Berkshires to Boston Tour". "My goal is to visit with as many people as possible, right in their home towns, and to talk about the issues that are front and center on their minds," Diehl said. "I'm excited for the chance to expand our conversation with this tour."
Diehl says he plans the first stop of his tour to be in the Berkshires next Thursday, March 10. As part of his visit to western Massachusetts, Diehl plans to stop by several local businesses and attend meet and greet events with voters. "It should be a fun day, and I encourage everyone in the area to come out and see us," Diehl said.
---
| DIEHL UNVEILS POLICY FRAMEWORK FOR GOVERNOR'S CAMPAIGN
---
| Meanwhile, with about 250 days to go until Election Day, the Diehl for Governor campaign has released a policy framework entitled, "The People's Priorities," outlining policy priorities and innovative plans Diehl is focusing on as part of his race for Governor. "This campaign isn't about me, it's about the people of Massachusetts," Geoff Diehl, Republican candidate for Governor, said in a statement. "The reason I'm running is to bring renewed focus to issues and practices that are important to Bay Staters. These are policies that will improve state government for the benefit of everyone who lives here. And, I am doing that with an emphasis on protecting individual freedoms, innovation, and successful economic practices. It is important for voters to know exactly where I stand, what I'm focusing on as a candidate, and how the positions I endorse will help their everyday lives." Diehl's campaign outlined a series of policy issues the candidate intends to highlight as part of his race and pledges to work on as Governor:
---
|
---
| For more information on Diehl's "Berkshires to Boston Tour" and to find out when he plans to visit your area, please visit his campaign website, www.GeoffDiehl.com. The campaign also will share frequent updates on policy announcements and itineraries by way of its social media channels (including via Facebook and Twitter: @DiehlforMA).
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---

Let me tell you why
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42650655/333740912/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk764-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODNlMWZjNy02NTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9feKil9Dv6l4wz1GfoEgNNPA0KX6o039jW-tizuv-5c=)
Peter – it's Abby. Can I have just one minute of your time to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign tonight?
There are a million reasons why this campaign is worth fighting for, but let me share just a few of the ones that are most on my mind right now:
This campaign is worth fighting for because polling has revealed that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect Sen. Grassley.
**This campaign is worth fighting for because, right now, Sen. Grassley is also facing a RECORD-HIGH disapproval rating.**
This campaign is worth fighting for because, after seven terms in the Senate, Sen. Grassley has left working families, like my own, behind.
This campaign is worth fighting for because I promise that nobody – _nobody –_ will work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority.
I know you care about this race, and your support means the world to me. Thanks to your belief in my campaign, we're able to truly compete. Thanks to you, we're going to _defeat_ Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority.
I don't want to sugarcoat things though – starting off March on the right foot is crucial for this campaign. So, if you share my belief that this campaign is worth fighting for, can you make a contribution right now?
**[Donate $5 or more right now to help me defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority. Every donation gets us that much closer to flipping this seat blue, so please chip in whatever you can right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42650656/333740913/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk764-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODNlMWZjNy02NTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9feKil9Dv6l4wz1GfoEgNNPA0KX6o039jW-tizuv-5c=)**

Each and every one of us deserves the answers. **And no Democrat should be able to undermine the most important political investigation in generations.**
Thank you for helping us uncover the truth,

name: David and Ian
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Thank the January 6 commission
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
It's not every day that we see an insurrection incited by sitting members of our government that nearly topples our democracy. But, since the day of the coup, the January 6 commission has been hard at work to uncover the lies of Trump and the Treason caucus and expose the truth. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42651660/333746854/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViZjY0ZGRmLTY3OWQtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sRCo6d44pJspSqxrb0O_1nyiuya0A4rWpMGAkgiTOb4=&emci=73dd5dfc-ff9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=ebf64ddf-679d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=16335001) Team,

It's not every day that we see an insurrection incited by sitting members of our government that nearly topples our democracy. **But, since the day of the coup, the January 6 commission has been hard at work to uncover the lies of Trump and the Treason caucus and expose the truth.**

We're glad to see that some members of government still value accountability and justice over party and dogma. But sadly, the members of the Treason Caucus remain in power, while Donald Trump has called his followers to retaliate en masse if he is brought to justice.

With the Republican National Committee officially naming the events of January 6 as "legitimate political discourse," it seems like the republican establishment is trying to diminish and even erase the effects and pain of January 6.

We can't let history repeat itself, and we can't let the insurrectionists and those who aided them get away with destabilizing our democracy. **[Now more than ever, it is crucial to show our support for the January 6 commission, add your name today>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42651661/333746855/1328163279?ms=em22_220306_JA1_adv_gq_act___D%26I_ettx&refcode=em22_220306_JA1_adv_gq_act___D%26I_ettx&source=em22_220306_JA1_adv_gq_act___D%26I_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220306_JA1_adv_gq_act___D%26I_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=dQ%2B50ahHDkuYjWP0%2FfNp%2BV49wGFvgN14cYv6GMzAuFdp8EXlGmgOihWjvoMIuampOqC3FU%2FjoEr2jsVmVrk146UWK8%2BtHbJdq84%2FOFfNVV0KkaICV9CZtN9K658meyjfqf7RQ5tEGNs9dVsxKIaeDA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViZjY0ZGRmLTY3OWQtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sRCo6d44pJspSqxrb0O_1nyiuya0A4rWpMGAkgiTOb4=&emci=73dd5dfc-ff9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=ebf64ddf-679d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=16335001)**

clean_body: It's not every day that we see an insurrection incited by sitting members of our government that nearly topples our democracy. But, since the day of the coup, the January 6 commission has been hard at work to uncover the lies of Trump and the Treason caucus and expose the truth. Team, It's not every day that we see an insurrection incited by sitting members of our government that nearly topples our democracy. But, since the day of the coup, the January 6 commission has been hard at work to uncover the lies of Trump and the Treason caucus and expose the truth. We're glad to see that some members of government still value accountability and justice over party and dogma. But sadly, the members of the Treason Caucus remain in power, while Donald Trump has called his followers to retaliate en masse if he is brought to justice. With the Republican National Committee officially naming the events of January 6 as "legitimate political discourse," it seems like the republican establishment is trying to diminish and even erase the effects and pain of January 6. We can't let history repeat itself, and we can't let the insurrectionists and those who aided them get away with destabilizing our democracy. | David and Ian, Co-founders of Never Again PAC Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn,Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. body:
President Joe Biden took the podium earlier this week and worked to spin his entire Presidency as a success, yet the facts show it has been nothing but failure after failure. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3mq38--fgxr-4qqlpo9&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | President Joe Biden took the podium earlier this week and worked to spin his entire Presidency as a success, yet the facts show it has been nothing but failure after failure.
_**Inflation has hit a 40 year high.
72% of Americans say skyrocketing gas prices are hurting their pocketbooks.
Over 2 million people have illegally crossed the Southern Border since Biden took office.
Over a dozen U.S cities have set homicide records.
Only 29% of Americans say they’re happy with the direction our country is headed right now.**_
Biden’s first year in office has been a disaster, Fellow Conservative, but his State of the Union seemed to leave most of the failures out. So, we want to hear from you: **what grade do you give Biden?**
| **WHAT GRADE DO YOU GIVE
PRESIDENT JOE BIDEN?**

Friend — Right now there’s a Grand Canyon sized gap in the priorities between Democrats and Republicans in the Senate. Here are the Republican priorities:
* Raise taxes on seniors, the disabled, and the poorest Americans
* Close the Department of Education
* Build a wall between the U.S. and Mexico and name it after Donald Trump
* Ban ballot drop boxes and throw out votes that are delayed in the mail
* Ban abortion, period.

Here are the Democrats priorities:
* Make those at the top pay their fair share
* Lower the cost of health care, prescription drugs, and elder care
* Protect the right to vote for all Americans
* Tackle the existential threat of climate change
* Defend _Roe v. Wade_ and access to abortion

As you can see, our priorities couldn’t be farther apart. While Republicans want to make it harder to vote, Democrats are fighting to make it easier. While Republicans are STILL stuck on building Trump’s wall, Democrats are focused on lowering the cost of health care and prescription drugs. **The stark differences here clearly underscore the need to keep Democrats in the majority. Friend, President Biden has been in office for only a year and he's already done so much to destroy this country.

* He's eliminated American energy independence.
* He's spending so much money we don't have that the dollar is becoming worthless.
* The cost of gas is up 40%!
* Our border is in crisis.
* His weakness on the world stage is leading to GLOBAL CONFLICTS.
* He's nominated a radical progressive to the Supreme Court.

_And in his State of the Union address, he promised to do MORE OF ALL OF THAT!_

We cannot allow this failing agenda to continue. We must TAKE BACK THE SENATE and put America on a better path NOW!

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Looking back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
When I was young...
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42653446/333755473/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk765-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQ5YjY4YS02ZjlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qyVKNL9YcVe35z_g1oicIeVGGs_-sFMCOJtiUZ6d8KA=)Hi there, When I was young, I didn't think I would grow up to be the second woman in American history to be elected both Governor and Senator. But it has been the honor of my lifetime to represent Granite Staters. I ran for office to make sure everyone was counted in our country’s shared success. In the Senate, **I strive to make our democracy more inclusive and more accessible each and every day – and I'm dedicated to continuing this work.**

But here's the deal: **Mitch McConnell only has to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and I'm at the top of his list.** That's why GOP groups are doing whatever they can to beat me – spending over $7.5 million against me (more than they've spent against any other Senate Democrat), rallying out-of-state dark money groups, and recruiting extreme Republicans to run against me.

I hate asking for money, but I urgently need your help to win this November. clean_body: When I was young... | | | there, When I was young, I didn't think I would grow up to be the second woman in American history to be elected both Governor and Senator. But it has been the honor of my lifetime to represent Granite Staters. I ran for office to make sure everyone was counted in our country’s shared success. In the Senate, I strive to make our democracy more inclusive and more accessible each and every day – and I'm dedicated to continuing this work. But here's the deal: Mitch McConnell only has to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and I'm at the top of his list. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GgxX7Uiur_DNwWosUr0MzkPoVRPi-X1R_PViukrV6QQ=/l8f5pSkBCMEi-e4JDUs11tPUsGt3DkQniyy5Tw38fD4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220306-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

This Women's History Month, I am grateful for the women who came before me. As the first woman to hold my seat, **I have a deep respect for the trailblazers who advocated for equal rights and opportunity.**
---
**_They paved the way for generations - including the historic number of women elected to 2018's freshman class - and I thank them._**
Many of those same advocates, including my mother, have pushed for the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment. In 2020, Virginia became the 38th and final state needed to ratify the ERA - **a long-overdue milestone in the push for equality.**

However, we still have work to do. Virginia's new Republican Attorney General recently withdrew from the legal effort to urge the federal government to recognize Virginia's ratification of the ERA. **This is a major roadblock in the push to include women 's equality in our Constitution.**

I am committed to taking the next step towards Constitutional equality in our country.

[_**I hope you 'll support my re-election campaign so I can continue standing up for equality.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/GgxX7Uiur_DNwWosUr0MzkPoVRPi-X1R_PViukrV6QQ=/l8f5pSkBCMEi-e4JDUs11tPUsGt3DkQniyy5Tw38fD4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220306-1-EM&amount=25)

---
With gratitude,
Abigail

clean_body: | | Peter, This Women's History Month, I am grateful for the women who came before me. As the first woman to hold my seat, I have a deep respect for the trailblazers who advocated for equal rights and opportunity. They paved the way for generations - including the historic number of women elected to 2018's freshman class - and I thank them. Many of those same advocates, including my mother, have pushed for the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment. In 2020, Virginia became the 38th and final state needed to ratify the ERA - a long-overdue milestone in the push for equality. However, we still have work to do. Virginia's new Republican Attorney General recently withdrew from the legal effort to urge the federal government to recognize Virginia's ratification of the ERA. This is a major roadblock in the push to include women 's equality in our Constitution. I am committed to taking the next step towards Constitutional equality in our country. | With gratitude, Abigail * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3112 Fredericksburg VA 22402 United States | = | = | = ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit =. If you wish to receive fewer emails, =. =

body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://elissaforcongress.com [https://elissaforcongress.com]
Friend,
This morning, Elissa discussed some of the more recent updates coming out of Ukraine and Russia.
She broke down some of the tough decisions currently happening in Washington, as well as how we mitigate the impacts of this crisis, like the rising cost of gas, here in Michigan and across the country.
We’re committed to keeping you in the loop, so we’ve linked the full interview for you to watch below:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x77vkYkP8J0 [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x77vkYkP8J0]
Thank you for reading,
Team Slotkin

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank you. I mean that.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
There are probably plenty of times you sit back and think, “Wow, we really need to get things back on track — fast.”
#

Friends —
I’m sure there are times you sit back and think, “Wow, we really need to get things back on track — fast.”
I get it.
We’re emerging from a pandemic, the impacts of climate change are only getting worse, there’s war in Ukraine, and politicians at home can’t seem to agree on anything.
It’s tough right now, but please: Don’t despair.
We can overcome these problems — one step at a time. But doing so requires a different kind of leadership. That’s why I ran for the Senate in the first place — to bring people together to do what’s right for the people of Arizona and for this country. And that’s what I’ve been doing since I took office.
You can help overcome these problems — one act at a time. But doing so requires a bit of sacrifice. It requires volunteering. It requires chipping in a little bit here and there — what you can, when you can, to elect leaders you trust to get the job done.
I hope I’ve earned your trust. And if I have, today, I need to ask for your support:
[**Can you please make a contribution — $3 or whatever you can afford — to help me defend this seat and win re-election? Solving our problems and winning this election require all of us to do our part.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220306-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=2264_6688874_gMWd6C&akid=2264%2E6688874%2EgMWd6C)

Hello,
Russian state media is now airing clips from Fox News of people like Donald Trump and Tucker Carlson praising Vladimir Putin.
When I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy and the commander of all U.S. forces in East Africa, I requested that Fox News be turned off in the mess halls during meal hours. Its lie-filled propaganda was a national security threat to my troops’ ability to carry out our mission.
I’ve seen the real-life consequences of disinformation and media lies that are manufactured and repeated by people like Donald Trump and his acolytes like my opponent Chuck Grassley. And as January 6th showed, it is a threat to our very democracy.
It will take significant campaign funding to fight back against all of the lies Fox News and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are going to tell about me. That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising another $100,000 before our first March deadline at midnight tomorrow.
Right now, we are still falling a little short, but with the help of grassroots donors like you now, we can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue:
[**Please, will you give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our critical deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42655486/333765194/-42398318?refcode=em20220306mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDY4MTc2Mi03ZTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AJ8Hpx2y-mmT0fAoysoMUa2T-168S81RX6pJApfk8u4=)

clean_body: Hello, Russian state media is now airing clips from Fox News of people like Donald Trump and Tucker Carlson praising Vladimir Putin. When I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy and the commander of all U.S. forces in East Africa, I requested that Fox News be turned off in the mess halls during meal hours. Its lie-filled propaganda was a national security threat to my troops’ ability to carry out our mission. I’ve seen the real-life consequences of disinformation and media lies that are manufactured and repeated by people like Donald Trump and his acolytes like my opponent Chuck Grassley. And as January 6th showed, it is a threat to our very democracy. It will take significant campaign funding to fight back against all of the lies Fox News and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are going to tell about me. That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising another $100,000 before our first March deadline at midnight tomorrow. Right now, we are still falling a little short, but with the help of grassroots donors like you now, we can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Fox News’ propaganda and Chuck Grassley’s lies cannot go unanswered. But I need your help to respond. Thank you for being a critical part of this campaign, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
