The horrors of the past week and a half have highlighted just how important - and fragile - our democratic institutions can be.

It’s been 14 months since our own democracy was at risk of falling to a would-be tyrant. 14 months since Nicole betrayed all of us in NY-11 and sided with her Putin-loving leader and the insurrectionists.

We have 8 months until Election Day and we need all the help we can get to make sure radical Nicole is voted OUT of office.

Dear Friend -
---
In 100 days, we have the opportunity to put the issues that matter most to everyday South Carolinians on the forefront: raising the minimum wage to at least $15, revitalizing our education system from cradle to career, expanding quality health care access, and so much more. These 100 days will fly by.

name: Democratic Poll via DASS
subject: do you support the Electoral College?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
Hello Team, we have a quick question for you:
Do you support abolishing the Electoral College? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_030622_B2_AC_30D]

name: Rushern Baker
subject: Statement on Angela Alsobrooks' Endorsement of an opponent
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
Below is our statement in response to Angela Alsobrooks' Endorsement of an opponent. Nancy and I are in this because we are fighting for a better future for ALL of us, and nothing is going to change that!
"Statement from Rushern Baker on Angela Alsobrooks’ Endorsement in the Governor's Race
I have the deepest respect for County Executive Alsobrooks. Because of my deep belief in her, I’ve been happy to provide counsel and advice to her over the years. In the face of competitive races for State’s Attorney and County Executive, I enthusiastically endorsed her. That’s why I’m extremely disappointed in her decision to support one of our opponents at such a precarious time.
When I entered the office of County Executive, Prince George’s County residents were reeling from the effects of a recession and ethical neglect. Eight years later, when I left the office of County Executive, you could feel the impact. We cut crime in half; became an economic engine for the state, leading in job creation; we were on track to build a brand new state-of-the art hospital; and the Purple Line construction had begun—things were growing.
Unfortunately, we’re in a much different place now. Residents are frustrated and nervous, and I can’t say I blame them—many folks are still trying to recover from the pandemic that robbed them of their loved ones and their livelihood. People can feel the pinch of their pockets with prices sky-rocketing higher than they’ve been in decades and the fear that comes with elevated crime and homicide rates. Just like when I first became the County Executive, the stakes are high.
I’m thankful for endorsements from County Councilmembers Calvin Hawkins, Sydney Harrison, Mel Franklin, Deni Taveras, Dannielle Glaros, Todd Turner, Jolene Ivey, Derrick Leon Davis, and Rodney Streeter. They, too, understand that the Baker and Navarro team has been fighting for your interests and will continue to do so.
The great County, where I’ve raised my family and built my life, deserves a leadership team that knows how to practically get things done—not just talk in theoretical “hows.” My running mate, Councilmember Nancy Navarro, and I are uniquely prepared to meet this critical moment with a vision that moves our state forward. With a track record of executive experience and proven results, we’re building a true grassroots campaign because we understand the importance of people over politics."
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Rushern L. Baker, III
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
**P.S. because of Maryland’s Public Finance program, your donation will be eligible for a matching program explained here [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
By Authority, Baker and Navarro for Maryland, Calvin Brown, Treasurer
Baker & Navarro for Maryland
9646 Marlboro Pike
Upper Marlboro , MD 20772
United States

name: Trump News HQ
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsbaqotg43fm36lu40pnd1n1bj9rqfucncalc6ig_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboj1p9lm2pbdd1jcppbec9l69j34chle5on9olkmcoj0t5i69r6ao30m8rmeopgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj33d5l6orr5cj666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5hmap76c9h6aoh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6kuilv2bepn7j53iktn06sd9subhosda628s9ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cliecoj2clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh1lm6t89ll5g3ioh5apocmjkh98p5vr2p7kb9f8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cliecoj2clh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaub1nm7fbu29e02bsh852ebjgk98uevfibcepm0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cliecoj2clh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztgc9ht08vlqu1n2fii3215hg7t1uqi3k5vlc2ko_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cliecoj2clh2bs)**

subject: 2 points behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you
| | |
---
**This is urgent, friend: ****I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying will decide Senate control**** – but I'm falling short of my midnight fundraising goal at the worst possible moment: **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42656335/333769627/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2566-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmI3ZWU1MC04MDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qw5kaduelTfEwr-LtMnAWly03icW4FE45_ii72orsq8=)
With your help, this team is closing the polling gap with Rubio – but unfortunately we still don't have enough to compete with the GOP's deep pockets. **I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to pull ahead and flip Florida blue, but I need to meet tonight's fundraising goal to have a shot.**
Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes – and this race is bound to be just as close. _Do you know what that means, friend?_ **Every single dollar is going to make a huge impact on our efforts to win in Florida. ****I can't afford to cut a single hour of canvassing or phone banking, because every voter I fail to reach could cost me this election. **
It's urgent, friend: Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records – and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to keep Democrats like me from winning in Florida again.
**This is a make-or-break moment for my campaign, so I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me close this fundraising gap, pull ahead in the polls and defeat Marco Rubio. It's the only way to defend the Senate majority and defend our democracy from the GOP. **

clean_body: I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you | | | This is urgent, friend: I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying will decide Senate control – but I'm falling short of my midnight fundraising goal at the worst possible moment: = With your help, this team is closing the polling gap with Rubio – but unfortunately we still don't have enough to compete with the GOP's deep pockets. I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to pull ahead and flip Florida blue, but I need to meet tonight's fundraising goal to have a shot. Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes – and this race is bound to be just as close. Do you know what that means, friend? Every single dollar is going to make a huge impact on our efforts to win in Florida. I can't afford to cut a single hour of canvassing or phone banking, because every voter I fail to reach could cost me this election. It's urgent, friend: Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records – and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to keep Democrats like me from winning in Florida again. This is a make-or-break moment for my campaign, so I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me close this fundraising gap, pull ahead in the polls and defeat Marco Rubio. name: The Wade Brigade
subject: Day Two of the Wade Parade!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=030622whem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=030622whem]
Good afternoon Peter,
Our second day of our Wade Parade was a resounding success as we visited supporters & future constituents in nine counties across the First District!
We started off the day bright and early at J.F. Gregory Park in Richmond, where we had an opportunity to plant a tree! Next we headed to Hinesville to meet some future constituents in Liberty County and after that we kept the momentum going to Ludowici in Long County.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/sat-parade-1.gif]
Our next stop was in Jesup where we enjoyed the beautiful weather on the lawn of the Wayne County Courthouse. Then, we were blessed with a warm welcome at the First African Baptist Church of Alma in Wayne County before heading to Pierce County to meet some dedicated supporters in Blackshear!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/sat-parade-2.gif]
Next, Wade went to Ware County to meet with Clarence Billups, the former Mayor of Waycross. He then sat down for an interview in Nahunta with Brantley Beacon, a local newspaper, followed by another interview in Folkston with the Charlton County Herald! We capped off the day at Camden County Democratic Headquarters in Kingsland!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/sat-parade-3.gif]
Thanks to all who came out and had a great time with us yesterday!
Today we’re keeping the momentum going – heading to Brunswick, Darien and ending with our big rally in Savannah at Daffin Park at 3:45pm! If you’re in the area, we hope to see you there!
Talk soon,
The Wade Brigade
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=030622whem]

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: America needs Jeremy Hunt
body:
[](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=e26fdcab3a594506b13b52085c0a95ca&_e=5Dj19WL1Fa0DQ8ZZVLfa3zS0EGY5XcyykJQjuNnsUuQ4BAR38VhhP9gDbh3TdECtfSTIpPphzJfmDp4BA215xNMHWcKrGjI75_k7PSztSWlk1rKaLQU6aE2HzDf4L28B1ccFcHy4jkwy4vlXZ6AmTOebMc-h-RSsFeXjZ4zsaOErdoZAaldTI5Lbpr9NCM4sTQRITpoPKpl2Gbo1DonCsJOQS6HQwMsitD0DlTpcPcvFScJUyUMlYw0_ulW7SrYMF9IYLqrCZlEZ1bbHj23QsJHtWi77f8RB8jYLdf8HrL0CsY_uitI1WsTje72Uh9LC4xhZrf_2x6SGW4M86_skcI7hMdObUo0L50c_Zt_YSrso_PtMiqWhxVi1dImtH5GF6kCMnyzYzUS9OmzOhXl5bw%3D%3D) Peter, As Secretary of State, I saw firsthand how important it is to have allies in Congress who want to put America FIRST.

**That’s why I’m so excited to endorse American hero and fellow West Point graduate Jeremy Hunt in Georgia’s 2nd Congressional district.**

Jeremy’s experience serving our country in Ukraine and his focus on protecting American values makes him one of the best candidates in this cycle.

He will safeguard our Second Amendment, champion parents’ rights, and support our fellow veterans.

I’m proud to stand with him as he works tirelessly for the American people in Georgia and across the country.

[**If you’re ready for a new generation of America first leadership, join me today in supporting Jeremy Hunt for Congress.**](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=e26fdcab3a594506b13b52085c0a95ca&_e=5Dj19WL1Fa0DQ8ZZVLfa3zS0EGY5XcyykJQjuNnsUuQ4BAR38VhhP9gDbh3TdECtfSTIpPphzJfmDp4BA215xNMHWcKrGjI75_k7PSztSWlk1rKaLQU6aE2HzDf4L28B1ccFcHy4jkwy4vlXZ6AmTOebMc-h-RSsFeXjZ4zsaOErdoZAaldTI5Lbpr9NCM4soNJi-DN6JNmRGJ3HWXGB_N-DkSp8vQ1Ze9LBKGSspY5SS8hkmL0I4OgGyGvlFmXFz9w-P71sMkCIj8svVdhrT8FkD68TbDS6XpdQ3-HPnyKqdMjL6XwRx2YCoNTyidy33Idx1Zl1UNv2HrmnRBCZTWHDTQdizLLxz0_OvtyDAGvIH7iVhoyF-fefmfapOahXfbypmgsENnNDv7fYEyHbfg%3D%3D) name: Team Cooper
subject: A redistricting explainer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This might be the longest email we’ve ever sent... |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42642514/333719947/823540626?refcode=ea.73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY4MmFlNy01OTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itA-zLAZIJqTEFR94oQkAH2lm10syb10nahWUD-VQ3w=&emci=5754f30d-189b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
Peter — we’ve talked a lot before about the redistricting process in North Carolina, but today we want to get a little in the weeds about what’s going on and how it impacts our communities.

Here’s the bottom line: By abusing the redistricting process for their own political gain, right-wing GOP lawmakers are undermining the fundamental promise that government is BY AND FOR the people.

**[Democrats across North Carolina are fighting back — and Roy Cooper is leading the way. If you’re with us, consider a donation of any size today>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42642518/333719952/435245919?refcode=ea.73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY4MmFlNy01OTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itA-zLAZIJqTEFR94oQkAH2lm10syb10nahWUD-VQ3w=)** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42642522/333719956/435245919?refcode=ea.73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY4MmFlNy01OTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itA-zLAZIJqTEFR94oQkAH2lm10syb10nahWUD-VQ3w=)
---
* * *

In North Carolina, the legislature is tasked with drawing new maps for state legislative districts and congressional districts. Since Republicans control both houses of the legislature, they take the lead on redistricting. Under North Carolina’s constitution, the Governor is prevented from using a veto on redistricting maps. We know how successful the Governor has been stopping so many bad laws with his veto, but on this issue he can’t.
**Think about that for a minute: Lawmakers are responsible for drawing maps that affect their own re-election prospects — legislators are choosing their voters, not the other way around.** (This is why Roy is a strong advocate for creating a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission for our state!)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42642526/333719960/435245919?refcode=ea.73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY4MmFlNy01OTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itA-zLAZIJqTEFR94oQkAH2lm10syb10nahWUD-VQ3w=)
---
We know that our democracy depends not only on _who_ gets to vote, but also on _how_ fairly they are represented.
To make sure that all of us have an equal voice in our government, there are a few rules maps have to follow.
Legislative districts must:
* Be contiguous and compact
* Cross county lines as little as possible and group together the fewest counties possible
* Account for communities of interest

Communities of interest are groups that may have similar political interests and would benefit from having representation. **Essentially, district maps shouldn’t dilute the political power of groups with aligned interests.**
Districts also have to comply with the Voting Rights Act, which mandates that voting procedures including redistricting must not discriminate or have a discriminatory effect on groups based on race, color, or language.
During the redistricting process, **Republicans have repeatedly ignored these rules, designed to protect voters of color from the kind of discrimination we saw in the Jim Crow era. The GOP’s new maps prevent communities of color from having the political power they deserve.**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42642536/333719964/435245919?refcode=ea.73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY4MmFlNy01OTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itA-zLAZIJqTEFR94oQkAH2lm10syb10nahWUD-VQ3w=)
---
Racial and partisan gerrymandering has one objective: to ensure that Republicans maintain power no matter what the voters actually want. **They will do everything they possibly can to ensure that Democrats don’t have a fair chance at making our voices heard.**
Despite the fact that North Carolina’s 2020 presidential election was **split nearly 50/50** between Democrats and Republicans (Donald Trump earned fewer than 100,000 more votes than President Biden) Republicans initially produced congressional and legislative maps that would grant them a completely outsized share of power.
**Their congressional maps would’ve given Republicans 10 House districts — or _71%_ of our congressional representation — leaving just 4 districts for Democrats.**
With their state legislative maps, **Republicans are trying to guarantee themselves a supermajority in Raleigh** that will allow them to pass their radical agenda and prevent Democrats from standing in their way.
Experts agree that the GOP maps constitute an extreme partisan gerrymander — **the Princeton Gerrymandering Project gave all three maps an “F” for partisan fairness.**
And they drew these maps _without_ substantive community input.
**Thankfully, the state Supreme Court blocked the GOP’s congressional map from taking effect.**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42642540/333719968/435245919?refcode=ea.73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.73682ae7-599d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY4MmFlNy01OTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itA-zLAZIJqTEFR94oQkAH2lm10syb10nahWUD-VQ3w=)
---
Peter: Republicans’ new legislative maps are going to make it harder than ever for our communities to elect leaders who share our values and our vision for North Carolina’s future. They’re _specifically_ designed to prevent Democrats from gaining power in Raleigh.
**But we have the people on our side, and if we work together, we can overcome the GOP’s partisan political tactics.**

Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene proclaims to care about our veterans and our police officers, yet she voted NO on funding capitol hill police and just three days ago she voted NO on the Honoring our PACT Act, which expands VA coverage to veterans who suffer from burn pit exposure. **82% of soldiers who served in Afghanistan and Iraq reported being exposed to burn pits and airborne toxic materials during their service.** Currently, the VA handles toxic exposure claims on a case to case basis, with the burden of proof falling on the veteran. Leaving suffering veterans with nowhere to turn. There were 34 republicans that voted in support for this bill, allowing it to pass and allowing for substantial action to be taken in protecting our veterans. But as someone whose father is a veteran, and someone who lives in a district of 64,000 veterans –**I am extremely disappointed in the lack of care and empathy from our representative.** Currently, Marjorie Taylor Greene has voted NO on almost all Dem sponsored legislation. When I am elected, I will work beyond partisanship in order to pass legislation that will benefit Northwest Georgia. Our representative should advocate **FOR the people** not for her party. Marge continues to put the lives of her constituents and this country at risk. We can’t sit by any longer. **[Rush $20.22 today if you’re ready to unseat her in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42656721/333771674/-804235033?refcode=em0306&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWQ1N2ZmOS04NjlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRbHXeBPRAaF5b_xNEXrz8SUjAW5IqjoNCOVWsPcAjA=)** Let’s win this, Holly McCormack.

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene proclaims to care about our veterans and our police officers, yet she voted NO on funding capitol hill police and just three days ago she voted NO on the Honoring our PACT Act, which expands VA coverage to veterans who suffer from burn pit exposure. 82% of soldiers who served in Afghanistan and Iraq reported being exposed to burn pits and airborne toxic materials during their service. Currently, the VA handles toxic exposure claims on a case to case basis, with the burden of proof falling on the veteran. Leaving suffering veterans with nowhere to turn. There were 34 republicans that voted in support for this bill, allowing it to pass and allowing for substantial action to be taken in protecting our veterans. But as someone whose father is a veteran, and someone who lives in a district of 64,000 veterans –I am extremely disappointed in the lack of care and empathy from our representative. Currently, Marjorie Taylor Greene has voted NO on almost all Dem sponsored legislation. When I am elected, I will work beyond partisanship in order to pass legislation that will benefit Northwest Georgia. Our representative should advocate FOR the people not for her party. Marge continues to put the lives of her constituents and this country at risk. We can’t sit by any longer. = Let’s win this, Holly McCormack. | | | = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Holly for Congress Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Freedom Alerts
subject: FWD: Biden’s SOTU Blunder
body:
Did you see this?
| |
---
| | Joe Biden delivered his first State of the Union address this week and in true Biden style, it was riddled with embarrassing mistakes, seemingly random pauses, and nonsensical comments – he even managed to mistake **“Ukrainian”** for _**“Iranian.” **_
---
| | | [ ](http://email.mail.freedomdefense.net/c/eJxdUU1vozAQ_TVwA5nBYDhw2E02lVZaKd1DK_ViGTwkjoyh2DRKf_0OKW2llayR5-vNvDe6gaLIurqOTQMMgOWszArGOKSKFQKFEr3Kcs6hjzgblLFpPyPqcdDYo_OYOgzxuWkhZyJrK10LjpzrSgvUogBO0F2d6dg25xAmH-U_IjjQC1cTAs5pNw7ktejc7TKenR8duT6osHj6ZLyuWQ6ZEHlBOzDIIcoPhLIHFkEZ6POQvL9O-8dnN4nfJ1c-V1fxd0dDyiUMckBtloGqcF19C_pxmTukYKsrpXilisR1Vqphsqa_bUUducqc3H3Uhy7JamR_1bI1mrgTUFhkaxencZabLFJZnIOXvZYrC7ToPYHJcaKOT-zRBXTr8jQ3OTztbu7y8nasKC2dNZoS_wXPRq-kj8fj4eVPEc-Nnq7GWuNLQWc53e9CSsYbhyYSPyOAexfAXXP4JsusTd5n92tNwY5suE34VbdBpJtiEIn9P12Xrd0)
---
| | Governor Ron DeSantis of Florida started off his visit to the University of South Florida **by asking the masked students behind him to remove their masks.** Governor DeSantis said, “We’ve gotta stop this COVID theater.”
---
| | | [ ](http://email.mail.freedomdefense.net/c/eJxdUU2PmzAQ_TVwCxoGDPjAYdts1JW2anqpql4sg4fEkjEIm2bTX98hpV2pkjX2fD3Pe2NaFCLvpUxti4AIBVS5ACgx0yBqqnU96LwoSxySEkZtXTYsRGYaDQ3kA2WeYnptyVQ5NBIFSoBeADXdAFiZupDYSehS115jnENSPCV44hNvNkZasn4a2Xv-qf1x8hNf7IWo4xr4kZdSQlNhXYlcYiGrBpLixCBHhASryI81ii8FBPF6-7oePr3dn74Xx5cLJ9c4qpGMXUeuom3yPRimdemJg51ptC4bLQ6-d0qPs7PDfS_q2dX24h9f_ZHlsBk13IzqrGHqDBRX1bnVG1rUrorSjpYY1GDUxoIchcBgapq54y_25CP5bXj-l2eOb815-SY7TivvrOHEf8GrNRvp8_l8-vFZpEtr5pt1zoaq5q1cHmthIdOdQ5vUHxLERxfiQ3J8JwvOHX4t_nlL4Ue28T7Tv7odItsVw6Q-_gZR9KzR)
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://email.mail.freedomdefense.net/c/eJxdUU1PwzAM_TXtrVXqfmQ99ACM7YS0I3CJ0sbdAmlaNYnG-PV4pQOBFFnxs_2c96IaKMusq-tYN8AAWM6qrGSsgFSykiOXvJdZXhTQRwUbpDZpPyOqcVDYo3WYWvTxqcnqYlO3LFeM9QUHQJVxrFVW83ajoK1i05y8n1yU30WwozM5l9rQGQwOF9puHAiWw2R0f6GbC63rZj15PVpHebAr0mKU705aEdf2cDjsXp_KCKrgBzGg0mEgeGFcQTeGuaORbas2UhYbWSa2M-Jn0dLUUSr10VLbzYXkGkR_VqLVipQSkQ-iNcEqnMVqgpAGZ-9Er4Tz0qNB54hMjBNeH_3NPVqP1hM17U0-9m_vYV-_TM9UFtZoRYV_4F9x8dyo6ayN0a7i9AnHm13xqqGJ-H0EsEwBLA7Dr1hmTPI528drCR4o-suEP30rRbo6BhHffgFFL60I)

subject: One more week for petitions!

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f508a8cafd3f/tune-in-for-tonights-debate-6763790?e=fe97fe84cf)
---
| | [ ](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=a79f101436&e=fe97fe84cf)
---
| | [ ](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=0ba2df5483&e=fe97fe84cf)
---
While the deadline to file candidate petitions is Tuesday, March 15, we need to collect all of the petitions statewide by next weekend in order to make sure we have all of our petitions in order.

We could use more volunteers this week for our final push to collect enough signatures to get Dr. Zama on the ballot. We need to have over 2,000 signatures statewide with at least 100 signatures from each of 10 different counties.

If you are able to circulate petitions this week to get Dr. Zama on the ballot and you have not gotten any petitions yet, please email [ZamaforPA@gmail.com](mailto:ZamaforPA@gmail.com?subject=Petitions%20Volunteer) or fill out our petition form on [www.zamaforpa.com/petitions](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=9600462b5a&e=fe97fe84cf)

If you are already circulating petitions, please make sure that you have emailed us an updated count of how many signatures you have in-hand and make arrangements to get your petition back to our campaign.

name: American Action News
subject: It’s ready to ship to you
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcdcvot2364ig0m57bng1lf3enr3l1pe6a2v6e58_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2upojatb6cpgb0o73e6q39obhc4rj0t76mkpr0s3kmtgm0sbjm5imbdjicjh3cs37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlc2qr8c3ncpj3co5jcdjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cdim9or0s9hm49fg)
| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2f2s1ogv18qvofc77hpq5qp6t4jhtfii5c99nq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clie6o72cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6up31076vftfok0q2gvs8s9gkh7edfpim7a6kro_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clie6o72cdh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaj5ase3rjlhrl032mks4ub4m0cfmptrmhq8cr5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clie6o72cdh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbapanbm0sg9ik9u5vab2goqk1k003h3q20aqgg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3clie6o72cdh2bs)**
---

subject: Anti-Ron DeSantis billboards across Florida

body:
Can we count on you?

Fellow Patriot,

The American Truckers Freedom Convoy is UNDERWAY! Two of our convoys have launched and more are set to get rolling in the coming days.

Our grassroots movement has been building for two weeks and now it’s go time. The amazing support from patriots all across the country has allowed us to get this far, **[but we urgently need more gas sponsors to get our Truckers across the country.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8g07tq4n0cga9ci2so92j6taekqcqctujkufba8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdg60ob1c1h2bs "but we urgently need more gas sponsors to get our Truckers across the country.")**
**_[FILL A GAS TANK](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm8rtgmos6pl9f5jm9cq2180bat86l9sg7aojca0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdg60ob1c1h2bs "FILL A GAS TANK")_**
This movement is critical in the face of the politicians quietly trying to sweep COVID under the rug while they maintain their emergency powers. **Our message is clear: End every mandate. End every restriction. End the Emergency.**

**[We’re humbly asking you to help us get every truck that wants to join the convoy to our freedom rally in Virginia by chipping in today.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zscijjt9f7fg1jc894j8pjm5rv7g6cfe9993ofog_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdg60ob1c1h2bs "We’re humbly asking you to help us get every truck that wants to join the convoy to our freedom rally in Virginia by chipping in today.")**

The more trucks we get to the Freedom Rally, the more the politicians in DC will listen to our leadership delegation when they go meet with lawmakers.

In Freedom,

American Truckers Freedom Convoy

LISTENER POLL: DeSantis LOSING to Charlie Crist
Friends,

Hey Peter Willis — our movement is growing faster than I can believe!
We’ve brought on so many new supporters (welcome!) in the last few weeks that I wanted to take a minute to re-introduce myself. Whether this is the first time you’re hearing from me, or if you’ve been with us since the last time I ran in 2020, it’s so important to me that you understand who I am and why I’m in this race.
I’ll get to the details in a minute, but it really all comes down to this:
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6H2u0YGVJTw6Ara6iM2yxjNcT0RUSPyYvPNVALmfdZvA2EgosaoSsk4kCrP6A4aZLh15SCCApWY_nGZf1OokjeiGuIiAQwpeCro8d8U1AUimvS6ISSz26vYWdVswJBV2AHGn-o2lpom6gIGoms0rG1BI7fYrHWD7VL81m4P6Qp7H-67jjE8oKQBADxPNBkbWl62-TPaMpzpq-7nJ7vC-NXFiJHk6ih1dtvEvIgbZCPX1yxBlnzk0UtNKpKEEGLCLDq7avpIh18YM3ziBRbPc7l3MOyQ1lBpWUzFRGvALnGfLaoF5nojvosPGn2AyTQ-hn4/3k4/85oCZMy1TuqycyhakCHEMQ/h1/ez_ZgVVhmD4E-Nbc2OqUSgnsNCFDcHQnXKH-yzmHUfA)

I’m in this race for my kids, and for all the working families from Long Island to Queens to the Bronx to Westchester who have never felt seen or supported by their elected officials.
**Growing up working-class right here on Long Island, I understand the challenges working families face because they are the same ones my own family dealt with.** It also goes to show just how little has changed with the same establishment politicians in office: empty promises, all talk, no action.
As a mom of three, I know how hard it is to be a working parent, juggling three jobs while navigating gaps in health insurance and balancing childcare. I know the struggles families and caregivers in NY-03 face — living paycheck to paycheck, insurmountable debt that keeps you up at night, and policymakers who seem more concerned about lining their own pockets that looking out for their constituents.
**That’s why I'm running for Congress — because our families deserve a champion with the lived experience to fight for what they need.** Someone who will fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal to protect our children’s future, gun safety legislation, voting rights, and reproductive rights.
[ So, can you chip in TODAY to fuel our grassroots campaign for working families and send this Long Island mom to Congress?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6H2u0YGVJTw6Ara6iM2yxjN7OVt4Nw6NregnZG7PWGS49-Ug2XXaCTXxxzbEWKLf04JYC_fovrQ1NYas5F4YkbkzspWNgXuAa2N2NREo9ZTKFwruBknZwWKHHdP6cFJEbDM1_he0XFMchlwKbeAY9_oVG6uJdghWSfUsyVS4vi3Z_mA1crna8Ld-9v9Q0iZYDr7MIDrQdAMh_9p2KEsmccO41t3Zir9n709CxlL1J_thfY1PKlefFt_M8TMorsWMdAbmfMCVFddIsbB7fzGSGSOYlaVMwXFaVfqi6CKXAowHTO8AciqNtlgJJWXo9YCtCM/3k4/85oCZMy1TuqycyhakCHEMQ/h2/qUR0LzOa5ry1N0XAODpE2v9QhWLqSMKCfg-gaAsgmGQ)

clean_body: | | | | Hey Peter Willis — our movement is growing faster than I can believe! We’ve brought on so many new supporters (welcome!) in the last few weeks that I wanted to take a minute to re-introduce myself. Whether this is the first time you’re hearing from me, or if you’ve been with us since the last time I ran in 2020, it’s so important to me that you understand who I am and why I’m in this race. I’ll get to the details in a minute, but it really all comes down to this: I’m in this race for my kids, and for all the working families from Long Island to Queens to the Bronx to Westchester who have never felt seen or supported by their elected officials. Growing up working-class right here on Long Island, I understand the challenges working families face because they are the same ones my own family dealt with. It also goes to show just how little has changed with the same establishment politicians in office: empty promises, all talk, no action. As a mom of three, I know how hard it is to be a working parent, juggling three jobs while navigating gaps in health insurance and balancing childcare. I know the struggles families and caregivers in NY-03 face — living paycheck to paycheck, insurmountable debt that keeps you up at night, and policymakers who seem more concerned about lining their own pockets that looking out for their constituents. That’s why I'm running for Congress — because our families deserve a champion with the lived experience to fight for what they need. Someone who will fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal to protect our children’s future, gun safety legislation, voting rights, and reproductive rights. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks for letting me share my story with you. Now, let’s go win this! Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. ** | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. name: Cheri Beasley HQ
subject: [Survey] Would you take a moment?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Cheri always asks us, “What are people telling you is most important to them?”
#

Cheri always asks us, “What are people telling you is most important to them?”
So, can you help us out by taking our updated issues survey?
It’ll only take a minute or two, but it’s a great way for us to keep focused on the issues that are actually on people’s minds right now.
**[Can you take our March issues survey today? Your perspective matters a lot to Cheri and our campaign’s effort to flip this seat and send a voice for our families to the Senate.](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/march_issues_em?source=em220306-1-ma-t1&refcode2=494.357359.dR6eRv&t=1&akid=494%2E357359%2EdR6eRv)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/march_issues_em?source=em220306-1-ma-t1&refcode2=494.357359.dR6eRv&t=2&akid=494%2E357359%2EdR6eRv)**
You’d be surprised, but these results shift all the time. And, as the news changes and more folks join our team, knowing what’s on your mind helps keep us grounded in what’s actually important — YOU.
Cheri always tells us that if we want to know how people are doing, all we have to do is listen.
We’re committed to running a campaign focused on people, and today it’s important to us to hear from you.
**[So, please, take a moment and fill out our March issues survey. We’re going to review the results with Cheri soon, and we would love to hear from as many people as possible before we do.](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/march_issues_em?source=em220306-1-ma-t1&refcode2=494.357359.dR6eRv&t=3&akid=494%2E357359%2EdR6eRv)**

body:
Friend, Did you get our email? We are preparing to file our petition signatures to get on the Republican primary ballot for Attorney General at the end of the month. **Please sign my petition on the Secretary of State’s website before the April 4th filing deadline.** Will you please [CLICK HERE](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=f3ef8600e86c4e6c9b8e75d2813f5f95&_e=VgmSBVexh2JzJlQzxMqfr9sLGetC3yYIxQZ6ip8OVJEk63HA_71HSpsDCGpQNch2V6gvO9-659qOk2GI1g4uMa2tZYLMsEbSn_dM5C2cNtUjC5vY8KMYdElBnb-EkumK4rrasmDf1jv65oubmuViwrRnAvWeRYSXWu2a2FHhWvF8Z5gPCZ6SR3Q7EWOLcRRnGGQYtIqBxczBfsD1k9TrDxeB5Y_txLc5-bpJgG7zT8ywl80DhIXkmzZ5bVwMZ1kZ5HoKuz6n3WRhMyE2YX8Dkw%3D%3D) and sign my petition online right away? It only takes a couple minutes! There’s a lot at stake in Arizona’s elections this year. We are facing an invasion at the border, assaults on our constitutional rights, and continued efforts to undermine our elections. **I am running for Attorney General to FIGHT BACK and be the CONSERVATIVE leader our state desperately needs. ** We cannot afford to have a Democrat or weak Republican in this important office. I’ve faced down the cartels on my farm, so you better believe I am prepared to take on Sleepy Joe. **Other candidates say Arizona can’t finish the wall or declare the cartels as the terrorists they are because Joe Biden won’t let us. I say MAKE HIM STOP US. ** It’s time we put Arizona First. Please sign my petition today, and I’ll get it done. \- Tiffany \----------------------------Forwarded message----------------------------------- **From:** Team Shedd <[info@sheddforaz.com](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=f3ef8600e86c4e6c9b8e75d2813f5f95&_e=VgmSBVexh2JzJlQzxMqfr9sLGetC3yYIxQZ6ip8OVJHp3uEaxbptiDc6pbrkWgFl_czh8ANVF2jI2dnFseIRnQDswTA7GokYgK3GidEgH_RsEFGQ-1nWlav9mvKnH4r2aQo8lNw1FUEvNrhVoDBGtTiX1xVFTI68JTUPCTUAz2YMLd67k_TUbh_JD1uquTuqxv7D4p99XqM0A2pcZSeuwDmkzkG74k_nwMr49m7C8fo4xy7GukHcCSMpeupFrysznxHzVFvqMNpJ9caTQ_O-Fw%3D%3D)> **Subject:** FWD: Petition deadline ⏰ approaching **Date:** March 2, 2022 Friend, The deadline for all statewide candidates to file their petitions to get on the ballot is April 4th. **[Will you go to the Arizona Secretary of State’s website right away and add your name to ensure Tiffany Shedd is on the Republican Ballot for Attorney General?](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=f3ef8600e86c4e6c9b8e75d2813f5f95&_e=VgmSBVexh2JzJlQzxMqfr9sLGetC3yYIxQZ6ip8OVJGEcMl5f-CddP4Oc3t8M5i8O0VoB_TJHkiDx-yo5Oab9UXkpnkUOr8-yH5FOaPMIw5xK7i5rZLPq7v4fSs4uOVvl-t3FcA8sTEvT85ojd4gsHFhcNz7YAArInx7yJMCn8zC2VmwqLEf-PMEtZtrDaIfOzzyRgCjEambTHmZyUP_i--QYu4UsPEjdiAtjYFtxuvy49ypKKjjjbDkx_rA7mB9gNebShjAMqfknxL_EtlPiw%3D%3D)** Signing online takes only two minutes and guarantees your signature cannot be challenged! During his State of the Union address last night, Joe Biden made it clear that he will continue to pursue the same failed policies that have created a crisis at Arizona’s border along with unconstitutional mandates and gun control that threaten our rights. Tiffany Shedd knows it is up to Arizona to fight back. As Attorney General, she will stop the border invasion, secure our border, protect Arizonans’ constitutional rights, restore election integrity, and put ARIZONA FIRST. But we need your help to make sure her name is on the ballot! Friend, please [CLICK HERE](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=f3ef8600e86c4e6c9b8e75d2813f5f95&_e=VgmSBVexh2JzJlQzxMqfr9sLGetC3yYIxQZ6ip8OVJFG41G4w8Q9gw8fQ3ZtofMCVDFGHEhQ8b_Dmaghs6oucgq0jJlfYWYZD0u8o_ZrBoEsctgpkTZuEO28CkESa6xhWvzIFnNQk-jOZqBdHHJO_CCnZlrxvCzOUTLm05jFwgnhZ4xoauCobk1T9t3yrbcXWIqj_ZoikoD4BdPOVS9_baHYNjpjS4NiBBX7N4PSXUjjAJxWR0PyjUJj6J8x_6NDqg_vDiOb5Qb2MVJ8i7lXzg%3D%3D) to sign Tiffany’s petition on the Secretary of State’s website before time runs out. \- Team Shedd _P.S. name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsKOj-ZHNr

I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom
are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a
very similar upbringing
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osKOj-ZHNr

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

I'd like
to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very
similar.

Both were
born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing,
raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went
to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college
and now have a four-year degree.

In most
respects, these young women are nearly identical-same background,
grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music
and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that
difference is vital to preserving liberty in America.

The first
young lady learned false narratives about American history in her
K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and
professors cherry-picked "facts" to fit an ideological (and
frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political
correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race,
gender, and class.

Her
teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative
about our nation's history-a narrative that portrays America as
essentially and irredeemably unjust.

Absent
any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these
misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen-echoing what
she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses
this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as invalid,
hateful, and even racist.

Maybe you
know someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised-I do too.

What
about the other young lady?

Well, she
received a complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At
her schools, especially her college, she received an education
that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history
fairly and comprehensively.

She
understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution
because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson,
Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources.

Her
studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of
"oppression" and "injustice" but an exceptional nation worth
defending.

This
young lady is an informed citizen. She will never be one to go
along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to
consider policies and political debates from a constitutional
perspective.

I ask
you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of
leadership?

You can
tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College's
National Survey on the State of American Education using this
secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59746946:sKOj-ZHNr:m:3:2532013465:45CAC575BB7F74CC6C9BEAA31236E516:r

This
survey lets you share your views about the state of our country
and how to change course before it's too late.

By
participating, you will give us a glimpse into the "state of
knowledge" in your community that can only come from the local
level.

The
survey is part of our CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

The goal
of this new campaign we're leading is to build generations of
knowledgeable Americans who understand

WHAT the
Constitution says;
HOW it
relates to current issues and events; and
WHY we
must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure.

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people
whom our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" either deliberately deceived or who
just didn't receive about a proper understanding of American
history in school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited
government.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today. Thank you for reading my
email, and I hope you have a wonderful day.

For our
children,

Bill Gray
Class of
2001
Associate
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation's history-a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen-echoing what she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as invalid, hateful, and even racist. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised-I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of "oppression" and "injustice" but an exceptional nation worth defending. This young lady is an informed citizen. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership? You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College's National Survey on the State of American Education using this secure link: This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it's too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the "state of knowledge" in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS. The goal of this new campaign we're leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" either deliberately deceived or who just didn't receive about a proper understanding of American history in school. You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government. That's because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on the State of American Education today. Thank you for reading my email, and I hope you have a wonderful day. For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-68163739194-echo3-DD06923BD4A3CC932564386F1B2C7182@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line. ----Powered by Paramount/Conservative Connect----

I'm pumped, folks—we’ve been busy lately shooting our first TV
ads.

These ads will be critical to getting our message in front of Ohioans
before my GOP opponents get a chance to smear me with their lies.

But here’s the catch: While we raised the funds we needed to begin
filming, we’re short of the resources to actually launch them. Meanwhile,
Republican billionaires are pouring millions into this race every day to
try and drown us out.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8438?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2614%2E3611125%2EcPLdtP ]That’s where you come in, folks. We still need to raise
$25,000 ASAP to get up on the airwaves. Can you chip in $25 right now to
help us flip Ohio blue?

Look, we’re facing an uphill battle to win Ohio. My GOP opponents are
self-funding millionaires with virtually unlimited resources to use
against us. We’re depending on grassroots folks like you to help us launch
these ads and win this race.

CNN says we’re one of the seats most likely to flip blue. And the Wall
Street Journal calls us 2022’s most important race. Senate control depends
on us, folks, so we need to give it all we’ve got.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8438?t=1021&amount=25&akid=2614%2E3611125%2EcPLdtP ]We can’t afford to slow down, folks. That’s why a donation
toward our $25,000 ads goal would really put GOP extremists on their
heels—can I count on you to chip in?

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Mullet ahoy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Re: the ridiculousness that is having a $7.25 minimum wage in the year 2022.
#
Derek,
First, we’re going to ask you to take action: **[Sign our new petition demanding Congress raise the minimum wage to help show how many Pennsylvanians from different communities, jobs, and backgrounds support a living wage for all.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/living-wage-email/?source=em20220306-4859&t=1&akid=4859%2E434096%2EYYWhY-)**
And now that that’s out of the way, here’s some fire tweets from John re: the ridiculousness of having a $7.25 minimum wage in the year 2022.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/living-wage-email/?source=em20220306-4859&t=2&akid=4859%2E434096%2EYYWhY-)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/living-wage-email/?source=em20220306-4859&t=3&akid=4859%2E434096%2EYYWhY-)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/living-wage-email/?source=em20220306-4859&t=4&akid=4859%2E434096%2EYYWhY-)
Honestly there are a lot more posts like this, but you get the point.
**Send John to the U.S. Senate, and you’ll get a lot more than** 🔥 **tweets, Derek. You’ll get a rock-solid 51st Democratic vote who won’t stop fighting until every American worker is guaranteed a living wage.**
If you’re with us on this, **[will you add your name to John’s new petition to tell Congress that it’s past time to raise the national minimum wage?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/living-wage-email/?source=em20220306-4859&t=5&akid=4859%2E434096%2EYYWhY-)**
**[Sign Now →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/living-wage-email/?source=em20220306-4859&t=6&akid=4859%2E434096%2EYYWhY-)**
It’s simple. All work has dignity, and no one who is working 40-plus hours a week should live in poverty in America. It’s time for change.
Thank you for signing on, ✊
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220306-4859-footer&t=7&refcode2=4859_434096_YYWhY-&akid=4859%2E434096%2EYYWhY-)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=8&akid=4859%2E434096%2EYYWhY-)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=4859%2E434096%2EYYWhY-)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Peter – thanks for not scrolling away. I know this isn't my first time in your inbox, but I wanted to make sure you understand exactly how important our campaign here in Iowa is.
**You see, Sen. Grassley has been my senator for my entire life. I've watched as, under his "leadership," families like mine were left behind and the good-paying jobs that were once in abundance trickled away.** That's what happens when the people in Washington don't fight for the people they were elected to serve.
**Iowa needs to show Sen. Grassley the door, and Democrats need to expand our Senate majority if we want any chance of moving our country forward for working class families. **
Luckily, this election year, we have a real shot to do both. Right now, Sen. Grassley is showing weakness in his poll numbers, per a top Iowa pollster. He's facing record-low approval ratings, and only 27% of likely Iowa voters want to reelect him.
This is our chance to flip this seat blue and expand our Senate majority, but I can't defeat Sen. Grassley without you. The GOP is sitting on a war chest of more than $39 MILLION dedicated to defeating Democrats like me and taking back the Senate. It'll take massive grassroots resources to compete with their funds.
**[We still need to raise another $12,500 by midnight tonight to stay on track with March's fundraising – ahead of our first public FEC reporting deadline of the year. So, Peter, that's why I have to ask you to make your first donation of $5 to our must-win Senate race: Will you please donate right now to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley in Iowa and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42658636/333783685/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk754-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGRkNjAyYS05YTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5ezSjsAFFC449YZXBOQtZgmn8Cfxo66mc_wi4_KJyo=)**

clean_body: I promise ... | | | = Peter – thanks for not scrolling away. I know this isn't my first time in your inbox, but I wanted to make sure you understand exactly how important our campaign here in Iowa is. You see, Sen. Grassley has been my senator for my entire life. I've watched as, under his "leadership," families like mine were left behind and the good-paying jobs that were once in abundance trickled away. That's what happens when the people in Washington don't fight for the people they were elected to serve. Iowa needs to show Sen. Grassley the door, and Democrats need to expand our Senate majority if we want any chance of moving our country forward for working class families. Luckily, this election year, we have a real shot to do both. Right now, Sen. Grassley is showing weakness in his poll numbers, per a top Iowa pollster. He's facing record-low approval ratings, and only 27% of likely Iowa voters want to reelect him. This is our chance to flip this seat blue and expand our Senate majority, but I can't defeat Sen. Grassley without you. The GOP is sitting on a war chest of more than $39 MILLION dedicated to defeating Democrats like me and taking back the Senate. It'll take massive grassroots resources to compete with their funds. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for everything you do to support my campaign. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

name: Stop Joe Biden
subject: Do you support the Biden Administration?
body:
Peter,
Every time we think the Biden Administration can’t get any further Left, they move us _closer and closer_ to socialism.

**Joe Biden has taken it too far - and we need to stop him from ruining our country before it’s too late. **

It’s time to show Joe Biden that hardworking Americans won’t stand for his far Left lies - and we need your help.

2. **National Republicans are already pouring millions of dollars into this race.** One right-wing billionaire alone dropped $10 million into a super PAC.
3. **I have multiple Republican opponents** \-- not one of them is looking out for the working class. We need to elect a Senator who will fight to cut workers in on the deal, not leave them behind.
4. **We’re facing a fall fundraising slump,** and we need to post strong fundraising numbers. Our opponents will jump at the chance to outraise us.

[**We need to raise $50,000 by the end of the month. name: Aruna Miller
subject: Visiting the Eastern Shore
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42658743/333784163/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220306easternshore_am_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGM0YmFjMC05ZDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDWySVWeikWzGo_UFssJKf8DB1VkJCniIK34_GEFUcs=)
---
Hi friends, Wes and I are running a campaign for every Marylander, so we’ve been traveling to every corner of the state to meet people face-to-face and hear their stories and needs directly. **Last week, I had the pleasure of visiting communities across the Eastern Shore, and wanted to share some photos with you.** [**But first, can you pitch in a grassroots donation to fuel our campaign to the June primary?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42658744/333784164/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220306easternshore_am_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGM0YmFjMC05ZDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDWySVWeikWzGo_UFssJKf8DB1VkJCniIK34_GEFUcs=) My day started out at the Tidewater Inn, where I shared Wes’ and my vision of economic opportunity for Maryland families with a wonderful crowd. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42658745/333784165/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220306easternshore_am_60da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGM0YmFjMC05ZDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDWySVWeikWzGo_UFssJKf8DB1VkJCniIK34_GEFUcs=)
---
Then, I took a walking tour of Easton. It was a beautiful day, and I love taking every opportunity to speak to community members about the issues important to them and what they need from Annapolis.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42658746/333784166/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220306easternshore_am_60da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGM0YmFjMC05ZDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDWySVWeikWzGo_UFssJKf8DB1VkJCniIK34_GEFUcs=)
---
Later, Wes joined me to meet multiple small businesses, as well as providers at For All Seasons Behavioral Health and Rape Crisis Center, who are doing essential work supporting Marylanders experiencing mental illness and survivors of sexual violence.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42658747/333784167/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220306easternshore_am_60da_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGM0YmFjMC05ZDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDWySVWeikWzGo_UFssJKf8DB1VkJCniIK34_GEFUcs=)
---
This was just one of many stops on the campaign trail for me and Wes, and we have plenty more to go between now and the June primary!
**[Help keep up our momentum and fuel our tanks (literally) as we travel across Maryland: pitch in $10 or more today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42658748/333784168/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220306easternshore_am_60da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGM0YmFjMC05ZDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDWySVWeikWzGo_UFssJKf8DB1VkJCniIK34_GEFUcs=)**

clean_body: | = Hi friends, Wes and I are running a campaign for every Marylander, so we’ve been traveling to every corner of the state to meet people face-to-face and hear their stories and needs directly. Last week, I had the pleasure of visiting communities across the Eastern Shore, and wanted to share some photos with you. = My day started out at the Tidewater Inn, where I shared Wes’ and my vision of economic opportunity for Maryland families with a wonderful crowd. | = Then, I took a walking tour of Easton. It was a beautiful day, and I love taking every opportunity to speak to community members about the issues important to them and what they need from Annapolis. = Later, Wes joined me to meet multiple small businesses, as well as providers at For All Seasons Behavioral Health and Rape Crisis Center, who are doing essential work supporting Marylanders experiencing mental illness and survivors of sexual violence. = This was just one of many stops on the campaign trail for me and Wes, and we have plenty more to go between now and the June primary! = **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all you do, Aruna | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Our Founders admired these heroes
body:
Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4nkl53kaqs06hi1bad46hh7r50bb1ibhuru8jog_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqredbiehg7edhhmtjm2pjnmspbct1je1i3ep76c6o68t9gmip69c9jmjjb6pdgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj32dpjcgrreob665ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5hm6o35c3i6eoh5u)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqfk536o4jafl9gg7dn9jhvh1e218k8coe1ad1e8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdg6ao74cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn’t recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you’ve ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zaa6i3n4pjkco4823elrj35g554g0qr0aiosibro_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdg6ao74cth2bs)
---
| | That’s because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we’re releasing our newest free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. ** **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course—it’s truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College’s mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can’t make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach.** [_**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” at this secure page »**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlouem9k97mp9dmttopbmd9j4llao4vtnbbj3qa0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdg6ao74cth2bs) __ Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, [please use this preferences page](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/prefs/9z2zgqqo8bqq75dvv8ah1q663r9877r7vkdvcd2tosg).
1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zb2v098hn93hp5krt2mdtps15qf6ac2si3ptknj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdg6ao74cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Mark Takano
subject: This is important, so please don't delete it...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I’m doing everything I can to support our veterans

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42654232/333759619/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDM5OWEzZC03NzlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UP-9BakFLkSL_Tm-xse-75os0b4jHn-RcoLOyiHO7w=)
---
Peter, this is a longer email about our veterans. Sadly, I know some people will just delete this email without reading it or look the other way, but I hope you're not one of them. This is very important.

U.S. military veterans have sacrificed so much to protect our nation’s freedom, values and interests around the world. That’s why I believe our government has a duty to ensure veterans receive the care and benefits they deserve.

**And as the chairman for the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, I am hard at work to make sure our government lives up to that duty.

But sadly, our committee has found a serious, unique threat to veterans: Veterans are being targeted by violent, right-wing extremist groups for recruitment.**

We’ve also found that on Jan. 6, more than 10% of the insurrectionists had ties to the military. Veteran Ashli Babbitt was even shot dead by police while attempting to break into the House chamber.

Right-wing recruitment of veterans is a serious problem that would not only affect veterans but could further political violence in our country. So, I’m working day after day to protect veterans from this threat while also addressing other concerns that affect our veterans like ensuring access to critical benefits and health care.

**But troublingly, Republican lawmakers on the Veterans’ Committee have attempted to obstruct our work and attacked me personally for addressing these subjects.**

[**Peter, in a tough midterm year, Republicans will be targeting me for pushing strong progressive policies and protecting vulnerable Americans like our veterans. In order to fight back, my campaign has set a goal of raising $20,000 by the end of the quarter (coming up at the end of March). Can I count on you to chip in $3 to support my campaign and my work in Congress? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42654233/333759620/301334478?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220306_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDM5OWEzZC03NzlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UP-9BakFLkSL_Tm-xse-75os0b4jHn-RcoLOyiHO7w=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42654240/333759627/301334478?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20220306_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDM5OWEzZC03NzlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UP-9BakFLkSL_Tm-xse-75os0b4jHn-RcoLOyiHO7w=)

clean_body: I’m doing everything I can to support our veterans | = Peter, this is a longer email about our veterans. Sadly, I know some people will just delete this email without reading it or look the other way, but I hope you're not one of them. This is very important. U.S. military veterans have sacrificed so much to protect our nation’s freedom, values and interests around the world. That’s why I believe our government has a duty to ensure veterans receive the care and benefits they deserve. And as the chairman for the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, I am hard at work to make sure our government lives up to that duty. But sadly, our committee has found a serious, unique threat to veterans: Veterans are being targeted by violent, right-wing extremist groups for recruitment. We’ve also found that on Jan. 6, more than 10% of the insurrectionists had ties to the military. Veteran Ashli Babbitt was even shot dead by police while attempting to break into the House chamber. Right-wing recruitment of veterans is a serious problem that would not only affect veterans but could further political violence in our country. So, I’m working day after day to protect veterans from this threat while also addressing other concerns that affect our veterans like ensuring access to critical benefits and health care. But troublingly, Republican lawmakers on the Veterans’ Committee have attempted to obstruct our work and attacked me personally for addressing these subjects. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you so much, Rep. Mark Takano (CA-41) | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. body:
The race has suddenly picked up steam, with a Trump appointee launching a campaign for this Senate seat, backed by national Republicans.

Hello,
It’s Sunday, so we won’t keep you long, but we’re hoping you can take one quick action to help elect Peter Welch as Vermont’s next senator [**by making a contribution of $15 or any amount right away.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1483?t=3&akid=124%2E61531%2EeR6BY3)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

The race has suddenly picked up steam, with a Trump appointee launching a campaign for this Senate seat, backed by national Republicans.
Losing this election could all-but-guarantee that Mitch McConnell controls the Senate again—and block our ability to tackle climate change, lower prescription drug prices, and ensure universal child care and paid family leave.
Team, we can’t allow that to happen, and that’s why we’re organizing and mobilizing the type of grassroots coalition that Peter’s going to need to become the next senator from Vermont. Keeping the Senate blue is the only way we can deliver results for families and defend our democracy.
[**If you can, please help strengthen this grassroots movement with a donation today. $15 or anything you can contribute would go a long way towards electing Peter and keeping Mitch McConnell’s Republicans in the minority.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1483?t=7&akid=124%2E61531%2EeR6BY3)
Thanks again,
Team Welch

subject: Please let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me
| | |
---
Let us explain, friend:
_**FIRST,**_ Republicans realized that if Val Demings wins this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority.
_**THEN,**_ polling showed her neck and neck with Marco Rubio, so national Republicans poured millions into Florida to stack the cards against her.
_**NOW,**_ Val Demings is falling short of her $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal. She needs to make up the difference before midnight, friend.
Republicans are trying to buy this seat – no matter how much money it takes – and Val Demings desperately needs more resources right now to compete with Rubio.
The last Florida Senate race was determined by _just_ over 10,000 votes, andh her race is shaping up to be JUST as close. That means it could be YOUR single donation that allows us to knock on just enough doors, call just enough Floridians and reach out to just enough voters to win.
