name: Mondaire Jones
subject: 57 years after Selma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Friend,
Today marks the anniversary of Bloody Sunday, when hundreds of civil rights activists began marching from Selma to Montgomery, Alabama in a demonstration against racist laws that prevented Black Americans from fully taking part in the political process. These activists, spanning race and religion, were verbally and physically assaulted on the Edmund Pettus Bridge — many, like the late John Lewis, beaten unconscious by heavily armed police riding on horses. The sacrifice of these civil rights heroes led to the enactment of the _Voting Rights Act of 1965_.
This weekend, I joined fellow members of Congress in marching across the Edmund Pettus Bridge. Together, we walked the path of the civil rights leaders who came before us and honored their memories and sacrifices.
**We honored the painful history of the past while standing ready to fight many of the same battles generations later.**
I’ve often believed that it's only by examining the darkest parts of our history that we learn how to avoid the mistakes of the past. And right now, we _must_ do better.
Today, our democracy faces its greatest threat since Jim Crow. Black and brown folks all across this country are being targeted by restrictive voting laws as GOP-led state legislatures limit their ability to vote by mail, cut early voting hours, and criminalize simply handing out water to voters waiting in long lines.
Due to the far-right Supreme Court’s dismantling of the Voting Rights Act, these restrictive laws have been allowed to take effect.
**By authoring key provisions of the _Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act_ , I’m proud to be leading in the fight to protect the fundamental right to vote and defend our democracy. **While Republicans filibuster democracy-saving legislation in the Senate, we can’t give up on this all-important fight. Together, we will continue organizing and building a movement that elects better people to Congress and uplifts the democratic values this nation was founded on.
I remain inspired by those who put their lives on the line to ensure all Americans can have their voices heard at the ballot box — and I’ll continue fighting for voting rights in the 21st century. In a time when Republican voter suppression tactics are rampant and hate groups are on the rise, we must march on in the fight for racial justice.
Onward,
Mondaire

subject: Contribute $35+ to get our new VoteVets “We’ve got your six” Ukraine shirt.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
In short, we’ve got your six, Ukrainians. So we made a VoteVets shirt to show it.
#
Derek -
Since the start of the war in Ukraine, VoteVets and the Vet Voice Foundation have raised more than $450,000 for charities supporting civilians impacted by the conflict.
The money goes to refugees, it goes to help provide ambulance and pharmaceutical needs in the country. We’re helping families and saving lives.
In short, we’ve got your six, Ukrainians. So we made a VoteVets shirt to show it.
[**Please make a contribution of $35 or more to VoteVets and we’ll send you our new “We’ve got your six” shirt.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-c4-six-shirt?refcode=em220306-1-tb2&t=1&refcode2=4538_3013755_UoQA82&akid=4538%2E3013755%2EUoQA82)

name: Van Hollen for Senate
subject: Why this deadline matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
At the end of this month, we are required by law to report how much we've raised.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42655295/333764045/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=e72ea68a-7a9d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=RAuJ9pKlzjQzEAWAmEBSdAt8DjFhiYTTj4A43onyN8Wd4x5sR6E+6XRGzOk8m+8Y&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJlYTY4YS03YTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SmDJOMK_GfcH13Us_J5hHZHuJoN8N4MOqQqMltDcDTw=)
Team,
In just a moment, we're going to ask you to make a contribution to Chris Van Hollen's campaign for re-election to the United States Senate. But first, we would like to let you know why your contribution is so important, especially this month.
You see, March is not only an official FEC deadline month which means we are required to report to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) how much we've raised over the past three months; but it is now also the last candidate filing month after a Maryland Court extended the deadline for an extra four weeks. That means Mitch McConnell still has plenty of time to recruit a billionaire Republican candidate to challenge our Senate re-election here in Maryland.
That’s why it’s so important we show we are ready for whatever they throw at us. This is the first time we must publicly report our fundraising totals since Chris filed to run for re-election and we want everyone to see the strength and commitment of the grassroots supporters behind him.
So it's important for us to have as many small-dollar contributions as possible this month. That's where you come in, friend.
**[Can you make a $3 contribution to Chris’s re-election campaign today? A lot of donations this month from grassroots supporters like you would send a strong message, and it would mean a lot if you could add yours.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42655296/333764046/-149995803?refcode=em220306-1-a&refcode2=e72ea68a-7a9d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=RAuJ9pKlzjQzEAWAmEBSdAt8DjFhiYTTj4A43onyN8Wd4x5sR6E+6XRGzOk8m+8Y&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJlYTY4YS03YTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SmDJOMK_GfcH13Us_J5hHZHuJoN8N4MOqQqMltDcDTw=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42655297/333764047/-149995803?refcode=em220306-1-a&refcode2=e72ea68a-7a9d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=RAuJ9pKlzjQzEAWAmEBSdAt8DjFhiYTTj4A43onyN8Wd4x5sR6E+6XRGzOk8m+8Y&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJlYTY4YS03YTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SmDJOMK_GfcH13Us_J5hHZHuJoN8N4MOqQqMltDcDTw=)**
The truth is that we have important work to do to protect our democracy and address the challenges we face. And the 2022 elections will decide our future course. We want to leave no doubt that Democrats here in Maryland and across the country are fired up about continuing our fight for lower costs for Americans, a better and more inclusive economy with good-paying jobs, and a clean energy future.
That's why it's not the amount that you choose to donate that matters most — it's your donation itself.
Because your donation sends a powerful message that you stand with Chris and want to see him continue to take on the gun lobby, Big Pharma, dark money, and every other special interest group that is trying to prevent us from making progress.
And what you may not know is that most of our donations come in through emails just like this one. So that's why we ask:
**[If you're able, can you please make a $3 donation today to power Chris Van Hollen's campaign for re-election? Every donation helps demonstrate the strength of this grassroots team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42655298/333764048/-149995803?refcode=em220306-1-a&refcode2=e72ea68a-7a9d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=RAuJ9pKlzjQzEAWAmEBSdAt8DjFhiYTTj4A43onyN8Wd4x5sR6E+6XRGzOk8m+8Y&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJlYTY4YS03YTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SmDJOMK_GfcH13Us_J5hHZHuJoN8N4MOqQqMltDcDTw=)**
Thank you in advance for donating whatever you can today. It means a lot to us during this very important month.
Thank you for all that you do.
Team Van Hollen

clean_body: At the end of this month, we are required by law to report how much we've raised. = Team, In just a moment, we're going to ask you to make a contribution to Chris Van Hollen's campaign for re-election to the United States Senate. But first, we would like to let you know why your contribution is so important, especially this month. You see, March is not only an official FEC deadline month which means we are required to report to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) how much we've raised over the past three months; but it is now also the last candidate filing month after a Maryland Court extended the deadline for an extra four weeks. That means Mitch McConnell still has plenty of time to recruit a billionaire Republican candidate to challenge our Senate re-election here in Maryland. That’s why it’s so important we show we are ready for whatever they throw at us. This is the first time we must publicly report our fundraising totals since Chris filed to run for re-election and we want everyone to see the strength and commitment of the grassroots supporters behind him. So it's important for us to have as many small-dollar contributions as possible this month. That's where you come in, friend. = = The truth is that we have important work to do to protect our democracy and address the challenges we face. And the 2022 elections will decide our future course. We want to leave no doubt that Democrats here in Maryland and across the country are fired up about continuing our fight for lower costs for Americans, a better and more inclusive economy with good-paying jobs, and a clean energy future. That's why it's not the amount that you choose to donate that matters most — it's your donation itself. Because your donation sends a powerful message that you stand with Chris and want to see him continue to take on the gun lobby, Big Pharma, dark money, and every other special interest group that is trying to prevent us from making progress. And what you may not know is that most of our donations come in through emails just like this one. So that's why we ask: = Thank you in advance for donating whatever you can today. It means a lot to us during this very important month. Thank you for all that you do. Team Van Hollen = PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can , but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

body:
HELP US CELEBRATE INTERNATIONAL WOMEN'S DAY EARLY: SIGN SPEAKER PELOSI'S CARD >>
| | | | [HELP US CELEBRATE INTERNATIONAL WOMEN'S DAY EARLY: SIGN SPEAKER PELOSI'S CARD >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/6dzecp8-)
---

We're AWESTRUCK by all that Speaker Pelosi has accomplished.

As the first female Speaker of the House, she's made HISTORY!

_- She helped PASS the Affordable Care Act, expanding health care access for **MILLIONS** of Americans.

- She led the charge to hold Donald Trump accountable - **TWICE**.

- And she helped deliver a **LANDMARK** investment to upgrade America's infrastructure._

[**So to celebrate Nancy Pelosi and all she 's done, we're putting together an International Women's Day card in her honor! Can we count on you to join us in celebrating our incredible Speaker of the House by signing before Tuesday? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-2spPxRGS_)

[](https://links.e.dccc.)
Speaker Pelosi has already secured her place as one of the most amazing women in American history.

Whether you're a Democrat or a Republican, there's no denying that she has helped open doors of opportunity for women and girls everywhere.

So before International Women's Day is here, we're calling on 50,000 Americans to help us celebrate Nancy by signing our card!

**Can we count on your signature before Tuesday? We know Speaker Pelosi would be over the moon to see a message from you!**
[QUICKLY: SIGN SPEAKER PELOSI'S CARD BEFORE TUESDAY >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQeXY9kM_)
---
|
Thank you,

DCCC

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46499902&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjIwMDY5MDgzNAS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

Dear Friend,

Did you know Maryland is one of the few states that ties the gas tax to inflation?
**So when inflation goes up, so does the gas tax! **
We are paying more at the pump, and life is even more unaffordable.

clean_body: | | | | Did you know Dear Friend, Did you know Maryland is one of the few states that ties the gas tax to inflation? So when inflation goes up, so does the gas tax! We are paying more at the pump, and life is even more unaffordable. The inflation tax hits Marylanders hard and we need to work to repeal it! But I cannot do it without you. Will you help me? Sincerely, | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

body:
Keep up the momentum.
#
Did you see this new poll that shows Beto has narrowed Abbott’s lead to a SINGLE digit margin?
We’ve gained this ground thanks to grassroots donors funding every part of our campaign including the incredible work of our organizers across the state. That’s why we’re asking: **[Can you give $3 right now to help us reach millions of additional Texas voters and close the gap with Abbott?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53741?refcode=ema20220306-179210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=179210%2E444211%2ETyxKFP)**

New polling also shows that 49% of Texans agree: Our state is headed in the wrong direction thanks to Abbott’s failed leadership.
Abbott is taking Texas down a path of division and incompetence, and the voters know it. His failure to fix the energy grid, his attacks on trans kids, and his extremist policies on education and health care are just a few of the many reasons that he is unfit to be governor.
**Beto can win this race.** But we need the resources to continue spreading the word about Beto’s positive, unifying vision for the state of Texas. That’s especially true because Greg Abbott’s campaign has more than $50 million in the bank to spend against us.
**[Can you donate $3 or more right now to help fuel our organizing efforts on the ground?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53741?refcode=ema20220306-179210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=179210%2E444211%2ETyxKFP)**

We are building the largest grassroots campaign this state has ever seen to fire Abbott and get Texas back on track. And you’re making it all possible.
Thank you,
Beto for Texas

---
Madison Cawthorn has shown again and again that he does not care about the people or values of Western North Carolina and instead is using the office as a launchpad to garner national attention and notoriety.
After district-shopping during the last round of redistricting, he is coming back to Western North Carolina to continue to try to spread his brand of dangerous extremism. What district he does it from is incidental for him.
Cawthorn has shown a callous disregard for the serious challenges facing our communities. Our rural health care system is under strain and many of our families can’t afford or don’t have access to quality affordable care. The pandemic has highlighted the need for universal pre-K and affordable childcare. And the need to attract good, family-supporting jobs here continues.
The contrast between Jasmine and Cawthorn couldn’t be clearer. Jasmine’s faith has taught her that we have a deep responsibility to look out for our neighbors. Meanwhile, Cawthorn has bragged that he built his office around communications, not policy work and constituency service.
**[**Jasmine’s running for Congress to give Western North Carolina the leadership we need and deserve. Will you chip in $25 or more to help us elect Jasmine as WNC’s next Congresswoman?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42655744/333766827/-600355290?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220306_FR_CawthornPress_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTNmMTY5Zi03ZjlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuuBvj9R0-ZXgw3S1yyjV7rt17n4B8mfXlAq_PgG_P0=)**

body:
I need your help to send a message to the Biden Democrats. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/2a333555a980fbb1/fde1bbb88cb314dcc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, The first End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline for 2022 is coming up in less than a month, and I need your help to make a big impact. This is the report that will go out to the public, and it is crucial that we show the radical left that Oklahomans are standing strong to keep our great state RED. **Will you chip in a grassroots donation now to help?**
---
[**MAKE A GRASSROOTS DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/2a333555a980fbb1/e0b0296c68790c53c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Not only will these contributions go directly towards our boots-on-the-ground operations to get out the vote, they’ll also show our opposition that we’re not about to give in to Biden’s destructive agenda. I need your help to keep this seat safe in Republican hands so that we can flip the House, and block every bad idea that comes out of the White House until we can make Joe Biden a one-term president in 2024. Please [**chip in what you can today**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/2a333555a980fbb1/b0d45e0afef7d297c3d6b838967d376c/34143) to get your name added to the list of March donors. We need to start now if we’re going to make our goal by the end of the month! Thanks,
Kevin Hern

I need your help to keep this seat safe in Republican hands so that we can flip the House, and block every bad idea that comes out of the White House until we can make Joe Biden a one-term president in 2024. Please to get your name added to the list of March donors. We need to start now if we’re going to make our goal by the end of the month! Thanks, Kevin Hern id:2022-03-01-20:10:02:560t | | ---|--- | | Paid For By Hern For Congress | |

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Why we need the Equality Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The fear and psychological impact that Governor Abbott's attack will cause on transgender children and their parents is incalculable.
#
Peter,
I'm writing to you today in response to Texas Governor Greg Abbott's reprehensible, discriminatory decision to investigate parents of transgender children for "child abuse."
The fear and psychological impact that Governor Abbott's attack will cause on transgender children and their parents is incalculable. No person should have their fundamental right to be who they are questioned, and no parent should ever face criminal action for simply supporting their child. This is destructive discrimination and it must be stopped.
I speak from personal experience as the proud mother of a transgender child. I have seen my child come to understand who she is and take the risk to come out as her authentic self. I've seen the weight that lifts when she's able to live freely — the joy, beauty, and creativity she brings to the world. As a parent, supporting my child in living as her true self is my obligation and the farthest possible thing from abuse.
**We must protect transgender youth in Texas and across the country.**[**That's why I'm doubling down on my call for Congress to pass the Equality Act, which would codify nationwide, explicit, consistent protections against discrimination for LGBTQ people. Will you join me today and sign on in support of the Equality Act?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-equality-act/?source=em20220306-1077&t=1&akid=1077%2E420207%2Eil46oR)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-equality-act/?source=em20220306-1077&t=2&akid=1077%2E420207%2Eil46oR)**
As the mom of a transgender kid, I was touched, I was moved, and I was proud that President Biden spoke directly to my trans child and transgender youth across the country when he reiterated his support of our transgender kids in his State of the Union address.
When people's rights are assailed like this, the federal government has an obligation to step in. This crisis is just one of the many urgent reasons for abolishing the filibuster and passing the Equality Act to finally enact legislation to protect LGBTQ people.
[**Add your name right now in support of Congress ending the filibuster and passing the long-overdue Equality Act. It's even more urgent today with the attacks on transgender youth and their families in Texas.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-equality-act/?source=em20220306-1077&t=3&akid=1077%2E420207%2Eil46oR)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-equality-act/?source=em20220306-1077&t=4&akid=1077%2E420207%2Eil46oR)**
Thank you so much for your support and for taking the time to read my message about an issue so close to my heart.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220306-1077-footer&t=5&refcode2=1077_420207_il46oR&akid=1077%2E420207%2Eil46oR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1077%2E420207%2Eil46oR)

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Get ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
I have an important update to share with you
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42656309/333769433/-2081290588?refcode=jtk1186-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmI3ZWU1MC04MDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cbvWCcW8A2nl9Jt7_lQmAbxGiXoWM9JHoqW9a1fCjG8=&emci=b804b4f5-929b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=92b7ee50-809d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter,

I've been working nonstop to pass our bold, progressive agenda since our special legislative session began in December. Now that the session is over, I want to give you a few important updates.
During this legislative session, we were able to accomplish so much for New Mexico families – from strengthening education to supporting small businesses to building a more sustainable future. All of our victories were made possible because of grassroots advocates like you, and I can't thank you enough for your support.
**While we've already accomplished so much, there's still work to be done, and we have a tough road ahead to keep New Mexico blue. **
Since our special legislative session began back in early December, my team and I have not been allowed to fundraise. Now that the legislative session is over, I want to let you know that we'll start fundraising again on March 9.
It's my reelection year, and I'm going to need my top supporters by my side as the GOP pushes harder than ever to flip New Mexico red. The stakes couldn't be higher, and I need you to be ready to go the extra mile to elect Democrats down the ballot.
You'll be hearing from me soon – but for now, I want to extend my deepest gratitude that you've joined this team. Together, we're pushing New Mexico toward a brighter future.

Sincerely,

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b804b4f5-929b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/92b7ee50-809d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmI3ZWU1MC04MDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cbvWCcW8A2nl9Jt7_lQmAbxGiXoWM9JHoqW9a1fCjG8=&id=127162320) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer

Folks –
With the Senate majority on the line, all eyes will be on New Hampshire. News outlets across the country are already calling this race one of the most competitive in the country, and political experts just labeled this a toss-up race.
Republicans are one seat away from flipping the Senate, and Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have made me their number one target. **They've spent over $7.5 million smearing my record and rallying their far-right base, and there are millions more on the way.**
In a deeply purple state like New Hampshire, we can't afford to be outraised and outspent. If we're going to hold this seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority, it's going to take all of us working together.

clean_body: They've spent over $7.5 million smearing my record and rallying their far-right base, and there are millions more on the way. | | | = Folks – With the Senate majority on the line, all eyes will be on New Hampshire. News outlets across the country are already calling this race one of the most competitive in the country, and political experts just labeled this a toss-up race. Republicans are one seat away from flipping the Senate, and Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have made me their number one target. They've spent over $7.5 million smearing my record and rallying their far-right base, and there are millions more on the way. In a deeply purple state like New Hampshire, we can't afford to be outraised and outspent. If we're going to hold this seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority, it's going to take all of us working together. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = This race is already an uphill battle, but will only get more competitive over the next 9 months. Republicans will do and say whatever it takes to replace me with a rubber stamp for Mitch McConnell. So, if we're going to keep this seat blue, I'll need your help, friend. = Thank you in advance! | Don't let the mainstream media make this bombshell story disappear...
We can't forget that Hillary Clinton spied on President Trump both during his campaign and while he was in the White House!
I'm not going to let John Durham's explosive report which unveiled crimes even worse than Watergate to be swept under the rug. And I hope you won't either.
Join me: let's fight for Trump by [building support on this petition and sending any resources you can](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bmpmg2lXbi9JsaYf-74E3BIqlv0Q0uY13i9ty4WD0ESAcaPKNK6Cor2q3qd1FkGHDbHEdEK851T6cPy3ZB74eDFsJEQuMgdb8XaHDG8Gk1RDBykIRg5hk4SJ0lmMSLMKRTudMX90zSZON5Eq8lXeZcJysPNwrDnAQeKh58LHNTdSa0KI7QnqVVvqpt_1-6_F&c=0Ucc1vjYWzJlEcrLYOJsLifqlexx1ZgEtRLXnVJuDDYi3BCnU7Uy8Q==&ch=nwZMoTzvz2stIM-nBn1GYtVzEQ1dWrmTDRIcYvqDyC42PlZzlnlbmA==) towards holding Hillary and the out-of-control Deep State accountable.

subject: Anderson Cooper Pal Attacks Texas Governor For Common Sense
body:
Whose Side Are You On?

body:

---
The world was watching when we surrendered Afghanistan and left it in shambles. You can be sure Putin was watching, he saw the weakness and indecision our leaders showed. The world is watching again, now, as Putin invades Ukraine. They are watching how we will react. What sanctions and actions will–or won’t–be imposed. **Now we see again, we are missing strong leadership. ** What message are we sending to our allies overseas? How much confidence do they have in us? We need to restore our place on the world stage, and it starts with electing the right leaders.

clean_body: The world was watching when we surrendered Afghanistan and left it in shambles. | | The world was watching when we surrendered Afghanistan and left it in shambles. You can be sure Putin was watching, he saw the weakness and indecision our leaders showed. The world is watching again, now, as Putin invades Ukraine. They are watching how we will react. What sanctions and actions will–or won’t–be imposed. Now we see again, we are missing strong leadership. What message are we sending to our allies overseas? How much confidence do they have in us? We need to restore our place on the world stage, and it starts with electing the right leaders. | I appreciate your support, and I pray for the safety and sovereignty of Ukraine. Signed, Eli Bremer | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid For By Eli For Colorado Eli For Colorado, 13395 Voyager Parkway Ste 130-Box 3, Colorado Springs, CO 80921

If I fall short of any fundraising goal this far into my campaign, it’ll be nearly impossible to make up lost ground and win this seat for Americans. So I’m personally asking: Will you rush $14 to help me close this gap in these final 9 hours? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42657766/333779268/1129282168?refcode=20220306_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTFlNWY2Mi05MDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fSPq88w9Za2s9-3cKExSpbOHI7ZfHF7Tot4wss2oDwI=)

[**THEN: **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42657772/333779287/1129282168?refcode=20220306_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTFlNWY2Mi05MDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fSPq88w9Za2s9-3cKExSpbOHI7ZfHF7Tot4wss2oDwI=)More than 50 elected officials, community leaders, and organizations endorsed my campaign. [**NOW: **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42657774/333779300/1129282168?refcode=20220306_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTFlNWY2Mi05MDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fSPq88w9Za2s9-3cKExSpbOHI7ZfHF7Tot4wss2oDwI=)My opponent just TRIPLED his fundraising because he knows this race is that tight. Launching ads, reaching key voters, and hiring field staff isn’t cheap. [**If I miss this goal, I’ll need to scale back my efforts when I need to be ramping up.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42657776/333779313/1129282168?refcode=20220306_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTFlNWY2Mi05MDlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fSPq88w9Za2s9-3cKExSpbOHI7ZfHF7Tot4wss2oDwI=)

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Celebrating Women's History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
Providing healing. Providing hope. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNTCdmXmRcR4GWEhfS1ujSBvYGBFoY4O05taer8Yu_Q3rrjV4F6oU8qT_LNp-6ffR4nPw1I5aBlxxRyaX009lqFGeQTQd-b79IvWILjCj1kn5UlkePqFciMUerV0nxDrcaA3O6vXxuBREQF5xu110yRvOqahjGkl-kk9j66SLAGkCf8l23gJFzdTocbQE3nCEN4jn4hhIbO7gJqKByB3AhEcPh_KZh7rC9EKN8tbxeSoCH9C9JoSoxw4lrcHkd4aVZ0izhMKoD6iaCF33SluyY-ugcu8lKvLkZFqoL8tPC2VpRi58o4Den5YWtXv4UxfPF5bKZu_JAzGQoa6aTxYEZRg/3k4/WrpqoX3tQ0yyhU1FxlNjXQ/h0/Ew52q0aAIFmcdHNQFwxR33pP2Y0TKLD9KziuHjPz8kM)

| | Team,

Each March, we celebrate Women's History Month. We reflect and deepen our appreciation for our foremothers.

This year’s theme for Women’s History Month is providing healing and hope. This is a great tribute to the work women have done as caregivers across centuries and cultures.

Whether in public or private life, women have often taken the lion(ness)’s share of care work. Ohio’s own Belle Sherwin was a business leader (founder of Sherwin-Williams!), Suffragette leader, and advocate for the oppressed. Her shining example inspires us to fight hard for our communities and prioritize the needs of others.

**This Women’s History Month, let us join together and consider the countless legacies and bright and beautiful futures of women in our communities.**
Sincerely,

subject: Support Our Vets!
body:
Our Veterans Deserve the Best Healthcare We Can Provide | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=dcb7e776c4&e=4712f71bea)
---
| **I support our Veterans!**

They have done so much in service of our country. They deserve the best healthcare we can provide. The conflicts our service members have seen create special healthcare needs that call for special solutions.

Last week, my opponent Ronny Jackson voted against Streamlining the VA's Process for Covering Veterans' Exposure to Toxic Substances (HB HR 3967). This kind of exposure is a hallmark of conflict post-WWII.

I support the bill and would have voted for it.

You deserve to know the differences between the candidates, and this is one of many.

We have a long way to go until November 8. I hate asking for money, but I need to raise additional funds to hire staff, to print signs and bumper stickers, and to pay for advertising to try to get our message out.

Would you please join me by making a donation today?

Thank you!

---

body:

Can we count on your personal endorsement? | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae2cd08bb4874ff2bafbeb3224c225fc&_e=Z8marnVO5p7ny-feUSuoR8ZsFBevDitwwUUfW_84bacNwR6FtnKom8fYhJyGqHlchQLYk-7S27WNrRaNjuHA58wFLV1sEDUf3BSb4TCI7vKsmreLe8NhYRaAsVZYGWt53TFumEqxD2R525Q-UyfxT3U2n2_tmvQ1vYGY3ZZebZMPONx80lu-LKPkd4pPyBOGxjBj78raL9VRHf8kdt7sCjLWVuEzpjBKStgRQn_vcEBhafdXwnnHlHXby1UwE7EZomtLQ6cV9vLie5wt3SZK4H-vwXU1u4wh9Kl8shwkbxf0hNTgabS0iFFcZXGhXB0CRQHHT0sGlDLp7i30BEcR11ZJG6w2cJUEJO-eRJMf-31tMZlLcmTAll6WlpGiFD_z6_FfaSL8cYRxHUXYFn3eewLEk5bbIPkblCYHRyY52hq3tDnQCll4LhCFzX5TAtI64t-pKrO9DsTqIPrf9088VkG1tNKl5Jl42jSOs8prQi0JlXbJPFfwsZXvWdpkGwy4vqb2DIpZL2aBYL7aPcZoyrR8VTTOImNTR1sMs4JM_MQtCKegpEAbz_4n26yAk9SX)
---
Peter,

We've been in the race for the United States Senate for six months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat.

The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America.

President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote:

| _**"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."**_
---

Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including:

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae2cd08bb4874ff2bafbeb3224c225fc&_e=Z8marnVO5p7ny-feUSuoR8ZsFBevDitwwUUfW_84bacNwR6FtnKom8fYhJyGqHlchQLYk-7S27WNrRaNjuHA58wFLV1sEDUf3BSb4TCI7vKsmreLe8NhYRaAsVZYGWt53TFumEqxD2R525Q-UyfxT3U2n2_tmvQ1vYGY3ZZebZMPONx80lu-LKPkd4pPyBOGxjBj78raL9VRHf8kdt7sCjLWVuEzpjBKStgRQn_vcEBhafdXwnnHlHXby1UwE7EZomtLQ6cV9vLie5wt3SZK4H-vwXU1u4wh9Kl8shwkbxf0hNTgabS0iFFcZXGhXB0CRQHHT0sGlDLp7i30BEcR11ZJG6w2cJUEJO-eRJMf-3388Vkg1V4RVUMkICdO2a7CiV_PysgAxj1Bs2e5ijNVrQk7xxvjjY21VHHavbW6lHFdWHvzyyA8Cf5xlLD4wBZbKCPZBX0Cxar_ct3eDT90WNoaPvi_8Ii4B1tAq8mVzgX_IeeVqmVN4QTINudO_V-Tk-QxfdF-R4dSv2NkkmLaC06F9CnY0jPjOM5J6ytwcx-xnQnD0e6aai6xfIXv0aMX)
We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side.

I'm a team player - always have been, and we need you on our team. **_[So, I'm asking you to join our team today by offering your personal endorsement of our Senate campaign.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae2cd08bb4874ff2bafbeb3224c225fc&_e=Z8marnVO5p7ny-feUSuoR8ZsFBevDitwwUUfW_84bacNwR6FtnKom8fYhJyGqHlchQLYk-7S27WNrRaNjuHA58wFLV1sEDUf3BSb4TCI7vKsmreLe8NhYRaAsVZYGWt53TFumEqxD2R525Q-UyfxT3U2n2_tmvQ1vYGY3ZZebZMPONx80lu-LKPkd4pPyBOGxjBj78raL9VRHf8kdt7sCjLWVuEzpjBKStgRQn_vcEBhafdXwnnHlHXby1UwE7EZomtLQ6cV9vLie5wt3SZK4H-vwXU1u4wh9Kl8shwkbxf0hNTgabS0iFFcZXGhXB0CRQHHT0sGlDLp7i30BEcR11ZJG6w2cJUEJO-eRJMf-32GzHeeIzTKWLawBskuLtrD-dxBnvphkYHjsbHVsTEAObCU1m17jv62JZzAmpVPzWFmtxTHr78UsM7SD2yX82ia0SpQE9t0ZzEDSc6ZNePVKDb-iXl_HvaglEtJhwc8v66o5eK22N9RjZErJ36MC4nbsrSKNpkQZmhz5oINpE-W2jRi_eX_S9BixNx35xKHPEkJLf5W291nyuR29kyBTtE6)_**

I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams.

While my opponent may have the support of Hollywood and national Democrats, we're building a grassroots army of PATRIOTS from around the country. Your endorsement will benefit our campaign as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington.

**[Will you stand with us and endorse our campaign today in this critical race?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae2cd08bb4874ff2bafbeb3224c225fc&_e=Z8marnVO5p7ny-feUSuoR8ZsFBevDitwwUUfW_84bacNwR6FtnKom8fYhJyGqHlchQLYk-7S27WNrRaNjuHA58wFLV1sEDUf3BSb4TCI7vKsmreLe8NhYRaAsVZYGWt53TFumEqxD2R525Q-UyfxT3U2n2_tmvQ1vYGY3ZZebZMPONx80lu-LKPkd4pPyBOGxjBj78raL9VRHf8kdt7sCjLWVuEzpjBKStgRQn_vcEBhafdXwnnHlHXby1UwE7EZomtLQ6cV9vLie5wt3SZK4H-vwXU1u4wh9Kl8shwkbxf0hNTgabS0iFFcZXGhXB0CRQHHT0sGlDLp7i30BEcR11ZJG6w2cJUEJO-eRJMf-32kioFLIDw3d7VZkLEo7CW-B0wR8A1YAKX1paypwKAmNJ0eKiS9kw-PpiGv3DqB4SMnHL8gndsdwN9O_vQGtfVK0wFHO_9R11Y2QAeP3Uic6EU2Ty5XLhanF8tDr3ZC_fbAE1KvekTD9VCtu4TFyawwZ2IgIFywj9ctp88q_SrIt-BYI-Lg7zBgQqkxCEb9GEHbW5mLTwg6uftk590d625m)**

clean_body: It’s crucial that you’re on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? It's crucial that you're on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? | Peter, We've been in the race for the United States Senate for six months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat. The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America. President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote: | "Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down." Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including: We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side. I'm a team player - always have been, and we need you on our team. I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams. While my opponent may have the support of Hollywood and national Democrats, we're building a grassroots army of PATRIOTS from around the country. Your endorsement will benefit our campaign as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Team Ryan
subject: Are you kidding me?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2615%2E3611125%2EgcUDeI ][IMG]

I just had a really tough conversation, folks.

Earlier today, Tim and I went over the numbers and we just don’t have the
money in our budget to launch our TV ads when we need to.

Look, we didn’t plan for this much GOP spending this early on in our
battleground race. I mean, $80 million are you kidding me?!

Now I’m scrambling to rework our projections and do whatever it takes to
get these ads running. Polling shows that winning this race literally
depends on getting TV ads up as soon as possible.

We’ve reached a turning point in this race—we either hustle and raise the
funds we need to get back on track for victory, or we fall short and allow
Mitch McConnell to buy this seat and secure the Senate majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8497?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2615%2E3611125%2EgcUDeI ]Can you step up and rush a donation toward our $25,000 ads budget goal
so we can place our ads and keep them running? We need to get Tim in front
of the voters ASAP to win this race. We can’t let Tim down.

If we can raise enough money to keep these ads up for the long haul, we’ll
have Mitch McConnell shaking in his boots in no time—but that starts with
you, folks.

—Dave Chase

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update March 6, 2022
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c8aef094881d/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8858245?e=698f056321)
---
Here is a recap of a few highlights from this week in my role as State Senator from District 52, as well as updates from our Congressional Campaign. Fulfilling my duties as State Senator will be a top priority for me during this campaign. After all, I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.
|
---
|
---
_“Nothing in this world can take the place of persistence. Talent will not; nothing is more common than unsuccessful men with talent. Genius will not; unrewarded genius is almost a proverb. Education will not; the world is full of educated derelicts. Persistence and determination alone are omnipotent.”_ _―Calvin Coolidge (1923–1929)_
|
---
| | | | | |
### The Deadline to Qualify for the 2022 4th Congressional District Race was Tuesday, March 1, at 5 p.m.
For those that may not realize, the Congressional qualifying deadline was Tuesday, March 1, at 5 pm. We issued a statement to mark the occasion. Here’s the opening paragraph. You can read the full statement at the link below. "As of today, the field of candidates is set. I’ve traveled the 4th District, from the Pine Belt to the Coast. I’ve talked to many people and have heard common concerns from most everyone,” said Wiggins. “D.C. is self-centered and out of touch. Spending is out of control. Inflation is on the rise. Leadership, vision, availability and accountability from the current representative for South Mississippi are non-existent or ineffective.” Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=5496334275&e=698f056321) to read the full statement.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Statement on President Biden’s State of the Union Address
On Tuesday evening, President Biden addressed the nation on a variety of issues affecting us all. As a candidate for Congress in Mississippi’s District 4, I think the people of our district deserve to know what I think in response.Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ae8c227d6e&e=698f056321) to read the statement.|
---
| | | | | |
### Attended Republican Women’s Day Luncheon
This week I attended a Republican Women’s luncheon in honor of Republican Women's Day! As the father of a teenage daughter, I consider these women to be role models. It was great to catch up with Attorney General Lynn Fitch and all of these wonderful ladies, including those from Jackson, Hancock, Forrest and Lamar Counties.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Brief Statement on The White House’s Pandemic ‘Reset’ Plan
Better late than never! Leading from behind is not how one governs. Per the article linked [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=8834fb62bc&e=698f056321), the White House has unveiled a new pandemic road map that, among other things, rules out school and business closings. In the Pascagoula-Gautier School District, my own children were back in school full time by August 2020. South Mississippi schools were smart, took precautions, developed hybrid options and kept our kids in class as much as possible. I commend them for their leadership. I trust in people to make decisions for themselves and those around them. We know how to keep things moving here in Mississippi!|
---
| | | | | |
### Pumpkin the Penguin from the Mississippi Aquarium Visits The Capitol
I got to meet Pumpkin the Penguin this week at the State Capitol! Pumpkin is with the Mississippi Aquarium in Gulfport, and this fun group spent the day at the Capitol raising awareness for the aquarium and new initiatives that will fight for endangered species, such as Pumpkin.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Filmed Interview for the Mississippi First Video
On Thursday, I filmed my interview for the Mississippi First Video! If you are not familiar with my passion for Early Learning, in 2013, I introduced and pushed through the Early Learning Collaborative, and now Mississippi is ranked Top 5 nationally in early childhood education.Teamwork makes the dream work. Ensuring educational excellence for every child in Mississippi is a dream I share with Mississippi First. I am thankful for their efforts and look forward to seeing the final video for this year. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f93591da1b&e=698f056321) to watch our policy video on the importance of early education.|
---
| | | | | |
### Breakfast with the Youth Leaders of Singing River Electric
It was a wonderful breakfast with the students representing Singing River Electric at Electric Cooperatives of Mississippi’s 2022 Youth Leadership Workshop. The youth leaders recognized were William Rasberry of George County High School. Gianna Pierce of Ocean Springs High School, and Sarah Jean Scearce of Resurrection High School. Being a role model for young people and inspiring them to serve will ultimately create a better America. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1d4f027181&e=698f056321) to watch our policy video on making public service attractive to young people.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Meet and Greet in Sumrall
We had a Meet & Greet event in Sumrall this week hosted by Dr. Stephen Beam and Councilwoman Brittany Fortenberry. We had a great time! We met great people, shared stories and built relationships. I love the Pine Belt!|
---
| | | | | |
### First Responders Caucus Lunch Meeting
The First Responders Caucus held a lunch meeting this week. I’m grateful to be serving as Senate Chairman of this organization and look forward to acting as a voice for our first responders such as Lt. Ryker Haselden of Gulfport and many others.Our first responders put their lives on the line every day and deserve to be supported, I plan to bring this same mentality to Congress if elected. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ce87f0a60c&e=698f056321) to watch our policy video on Standing Up for Our Law Enforcement and Fighting for Real Criminal Justice Reform.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### The Senate Rescued The Teacher Pay Raise Bill
I am an Education Committee member. I will not succumb to the do-nothingness that permeates D.C. and is creeping into Jackson. Teachers, and students, are too important. As a member of the two committees involved in teacher pay, Education and Appropriations, I stood with the teachers to get them what they deserve.|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
## The Week Ahead
* Senate floor debate on House bills
* Continuing Appropriations work
* Thursday fundraiser in Hattiesburg

|
---
Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1b52a39196&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---

Brice Wiggins for CongressP.O. Box 1611Ocean Springs, MS 39566

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6ffd7231cc&e=698f056321&c=7f783c58b4) or [unsubscribe](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6ffd7231cc&e=698f056321&c=7f783c58b4)

name: John Cranley
subject: Want to legalize marijuana in Ohio? Here’s how
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
| My campaign will get it done, but not without community support. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42659061/333786004/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.0a5d2626-a19d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.0a5d2626-a19d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTVkMjYyNi1hMTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w-B0HfyqMhXur-TtmUwi-2x8NNEZMeUnkVh9BFzLGx4=) Team, I’ll keep this short: **Marijuana legalization in Ohio is long-overdue, and my administration will be the one to do it.** **[If you think Ohio’s ready to join the 18 other states that have legalized marijuana, chip in $25 to help us win this race>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42659064/333786015/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.0a5d2626-a19d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.0a5d2626-a19d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTVkMjYyNi1hMTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w-B0HfyqMhXur-TtmUwi-2x8NNEZMeUnkVh9BFzLGx4=)** **[DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42659067/333786024/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.0a5d2626-a19d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.0a5d2626-a19d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTVkMjYyNi1hMTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w-B0HfyqMhXur-TtmUwi-2x8NNEZMeUnkVh9BFzLGx4=)** More and more, we’re seeing evidence that voters are in favor of legalizing marijuana at the state level as a way to generate crucial tax revenue. And friend, we got new evidence of that just last week. Emerson College recently polled a group of Ohio voters and arrived at a clear conclusion: **The majority of Ohioans favor cannabis legalization.** The Ohio GOP and Gov. Mike DeWine have made it clear that they have no intention to give Ohioans what they want _(it wouldn’t be the first time.)_ I’m in this race to deliver marijuana legalization, clean energy, and other common sense priorities that DeWine and the GOP have ignored for years — but I can’t do it without community support. **[Friend, will you rush a donation of $25 or more to help bring Ohio into the future and kickstart our comeback?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42659070/333786027/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.0a5d2626-a19d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.0a5d2626-a19d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTVkMjYyNi1hMTlkLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w-B0HfyqMhXur-TtmUwi-2x8NNEZMeUnkVh9BFzLGx4=)** Thank you, John

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: 🚨Jacobs Campaign Update🚨
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jacobs4congress.com/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-6175677?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| Welcome to the Jacobs for Congress Campaign Update! A new newsletter to keep you informed on everything our campaign is doing.

The past few weeks I have been out and about in the newly drawn NY-24. I spoke to County Republican and Conservative committees, as well as met with elected officails and small business owners.

Some highlights from my travels:
---
|
---
| _Speaking in front of the Cayuga County Republican Party _
---
|
---
| _Accepting the endorsement of the Erie County Republican Party _
---
|
---
| _Speaking to Republicans, elected officials, and small business owners in Oswego_
---
|
---
| _Answering questions from the Wayne County Republican Party _
---
|
---
| _Discussing fighting for agriculture priorities with the Genesee County Republican Party_
---
|
---
| _Live with former Mayor Jeff Graham in-studio in Watertown_

Additionally our campaign has picked up a number of endorsements. So far our campaign has been endorsed by:
---
|
---
| And we’re just getting started. I also wanted to pass along what the leaders in our area are saying about my candidacy:

“I am proud to endorse my colleague and friend, Chris Jacobs for New York’s 24th Congressional District. Since taking office, Chris has been a strong fighter for conservative values and our Constitutional rights. He stood up for New Yorkers against the unconstitutional SAFE Act and held the line against vaccine mandates and lockdowns. He’s fought reckless spending, failed Far-Left Socialist policies, and to secure our southern border. I have seen his efficacy and dedication firsthand through our work together. I know that he will fight on behalf of the people for the 24th District.” **-Congresswoman Elise Stefanik**

“Chris Jacobs has served Erie County and NY-27 with dedication and honor. Since taking office, he has been a champion of conservative values – fighting to end mandates, support small businesses, protect parents' rights and unborn life, and defend the Second Amendment,” **Erie County Republican Party Chairman Karl Simmeth said**. “The ECGOP is proud to offer our full endorsement to Chris Jacobs for NY-24, he is the right man for the job with a strong track record of standing up for the taxpayers of Erie County.”

“Chris Jacobs has been a steadfast and strong friend to Niagara County and our conservative values. Since taking office, he has fought to uphold the strong policies of President Trump, secure our Southern border, defend our Second Amendment, and build up our small businesses and local economy,” **Niagara County GOP Chairman Rich Andres said. “** Chris has served our county well, has been present and active in ensuring our needs are met, and our area is supported. I am proud to offer him our full endorsement for NY-24.”

“Chris Jacobs has been a fighter in Washington and worked tirelessly to hold the line against the radical policies being forced by Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden. He’s a friend to the Second Amendment, a defender of unborn life, and champion of freedom against unconstitutional vaccine mandates,” **Niagara County Conservative Chairman William Ross said.** “Chris Jacobs has our full endorsement, there is no one more qualified or dedicated to represent Niagara County and this new district.

“He endorsed President Trump in the last election and voted against the sham impeachments. He has voted against all the reckless spending of the Biden administration. Is a strong supporter of the second amendment and voted against the Democrats’ gun control bills, H.R.8 and H.R.1446,” **Orleans County Conservative Party Chairman Paul Lauricella**. “He has been given an A rating by Gun Owners of America. He’s been a strong fighter against vaccine mandates and opposes CRT in our government and our schools. He supports parents’ rights. He is a strong supporter of our law enforcement and is against Biden’s reckless open border policies and a strong supporter of the Hyde Amendment. He is un-apologetically pro-life and protects the rights of the unborn in the womb. There are many other key votes that he has been on the right side of for the working class in this country.”

“Since taking office, Chris Jacobs has been a true friend to Genesee County, to our families, our farmers, and our small businesses. Not only has he consistently showed up to meet with our officials and hear our needs, but he has taken those concerns to Washington and tirelessly advocated for them,” **Genesee County Republican Party Chairman Dick Siebert said.** “He’s a true champion of the Genesee County taxpayers, and he’s a true fighter for conservative values. We are proud to offer our full endorsement to Congressman Chris Jacobs for NY-24.”

“We are honored to offer our full endorsement to Chris Jacobs for NY-24, and we are very excited to have a strong, conservative representing Oswego County in Congress,” **Oswego County Republican Party Chairman Fred Beardsley said**. “During his first term in Congress, Chris has been a tireless advocate for our conservative values, our Constitution, and his constituents in Washington. I have full confidence he will continue this impeccable record of service in the newly drawn NY-24 – he’s the right man for the job, and we look forward to working with him.”

I’ve been humbled to have an incredible outpouring of support – together we will win this campaign, take back the House, and ensure there is a strong conservative majority in Congress!

Sincerely,

Chris Jacobs
Member of Congress
Candidate for Congress, NY-24
---
| [DONATE HERE](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=545ea2bbeb&e=13f35c4add "DONATE HERE")
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|

**JACOBS FOR CONGRESS**
P.O. Box 387
CLARENCE, NY 14031

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=b6cb02ac78&e=13f35c4add&c=ad2d650a3d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=b6cb02ac78&e=13f35c4add&c=ad2d650a3d).

name: Strength in Faith Challenge
subject: 🙏 This Week’s Challenge…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
Team, join us in prayer this week for the men and women of Illinois law enforcement. Daily intentions inside >>> | |
---
Team,

For this week’s Strength in Faith challenge, we’re praying for our**Law Enforcement**.

As our state faces an unprecedented crime surge, we want to lift up the men and women who work to keep our streets safe. Follow along with our daily intentions:

MONDAY: We pray for the **safety** of our law enforcement officers, that they may be safeguarded as they patrol our streets.

TUESDAY: We pray for **healing** in our communities impacted by crime. May our law enforcement have the support and resources they need to get justice for all of the families harmed.

WEDNESDAY: We pray for **wisdom** for our law enforcement officers, that they may know the right and prudent course of action in emergency situations.

THURSDAY: We pray for **law enforcement officers who have been wounded in the line of duty** , that they and their families may receive healing and comfort, and that the community will support them in their time of need.

FRIDAY: We pray for **law enforcement officers who have been killed in the line of duty** , that their families may receive healing and comfort, and that the community may remember their ultimate sacrifice.

SATURDAY: We pray for **those considering a call to law enforcement** , that in a time we are struggling to staff our precincts, new public servants will step up to answer the call.

SUNDAY: We pray for**our state’s leaders** , that they may enact smart policies that give our law enforcement officers the support they deserve.

clean_body: Team, join us in prayer this week for the men and women of Illinois law enforcement. Daily intentions inside >>> | | Team, For this week’s Strength in Faith challenge, we’re praying for ourLaw Enforcement. As our state faces an unprecedented crime surge, we want to lift up the men and women who work to keep our streets safe. Follow along with our daily intentions: MONDAY: We pray for the safety of our law enforcement officers, that they may be safeguarded as they patrol our streets. TUESDAY: We pray for healing in our communities impacted by crime. May our law enforcement have the support and resources they need to get justice for all of the families harmed. WEDNESDAY: We pray for wisdom for our law enforcement officers, that they may know the right and prudent course of action in emergency situations. THURSDAY: We pray for law enforcement officers who have been wounded in the line of duty , that they and their families may receive healing and comfort, and that the community will support them in their time of need. FRIDAY: We pray for law enforcement officers who have been killed in the line of duty , that their families may receive healing and comfort, and that the community may remember their ultimate sacrifice. SATURDAY: We pray for those considering a call to law enforcement , that in a time we are struggling to staff our precincts, new public servants will step up to answer the call. SUNDAY: We pray forour state’s leaders , that they may enact smart policies that give our law enforcement officers the support they deserve. Please, join us in prayer this week. Add your personal intentions to our prayer in the comments. Thank you, Team Sullivan ABOUT THE STRENGTH IN FAITH CHALLENGE: Over the past couple years, we have been put through the wringer as a state, and a country. There have been many times where we have all felt isolated, angry, and scared – sometimes all at once. During the Lenten season, we are joining in prayer through this challenge to come together and unite in our faith. | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Nancy Pelosi would love nothing more than to see us fail to hit our goals. We can’t fall short. | I have been working so hard to keep the Radical Left from running this country into the ground, BUT I CAN’T DO IT ALONE! I won the closest Congressional race in recent history last year, winning by just 6 votes. And the Democrats have a target on my back once again. This deadline is crucial if we want to stay ahead moving into November's election. Democrats have been calling the shots for way too long in Washington, and it’s time we put a stop to it. You can count on me to represent the Republican party to my utmost ability and take back this country and our freedom from crooked Joe Biden. Can I count on you? Nancy Pelosi WILL be coming after Iowa’s 1st district in November, and I would be lying if I said I wasn’t concerned about it. We need your help to Take Back the House - we can’t do this without you! subject: The Vega Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia
body:
| [ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=460143e3403e4846b5f97c894bba83a2&_e=OId47wGuqtAJ2GOH2qZNeZcHxCJfAYAsyTnfIODmjcCQE1lAkg8Vwiccf9u5gd9U4OnGKduosorkm7JMZKcLK8CbtzAnswUZNqcdcf9EWBYNrXxejFs4ns8I7vt-236tMatOd9w3fW9Tbcdfv5nmuNltaddQXdpUQd5rMbfyQPWA5MhM1AdOwoKEX5Q3TtoXVEt0a2u5swHzXkFo27wr3uiMrXsa0o5NcAjFtd9tFpvCr4niwHEVm9TgGxAUB3TnbvkPee26sr5Xe5zweD6eX6vNgrhIeh5Ywh_UENDpdvY0eFUVBSWk9xXSwxLeghAs_RacQA-KA-xfvYolX3U4PepKfISLR-L2jKdyOApKof3V0h9BHpXRpj7rqc6Rk_lVPcmsvkEW6a2_98WGqCUsCk7tUg_2YC7eHe968T8sIFnXKzaWtVbgFenvsLts6c9WwUOmd1vXPh1jxanImR3bBng3q8MvEJ78sWhb-EsC0GtftDCsQo-pXfQLScB7Rkre)
---
Friend,

We’ve had a great week on the campaign trail. Last Sunday, we took part in our first 7th Congressional District forum hosted by the Fredericksburg Virginia Patriots and the Family Foundation. It was a great event where I got to meet with over 100 passionate conservatives and share my vision on how we are going to fix Washington, D.C. and defeat Abigail Spanberger in November. If you weren’t able to make it, you can watch the full forum [**HERE.**](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=460143e3403e4846b5f97c894bba83a2&_e=OId47wGuqtAJ2GOH2qZNeQny9MIXsCvNSiAElsLe7GsQTdj5_CNVKeI7oj_ateOqKmgv4Eap56ed2r6kBDqe7Rzg8OY64dagA7zfF67otPen_tmgUZ1h4yYWXKGkhGZPFDA42943yWX6uq_QPTUx79qcGBD7omomPj9ZGxwwWu_G-61WcPCbqfgEQ-sVoBjwoFXQz4WcxjWv1tkvEPMTmrAkGIO_d2HO0Xog0ZzwIBV_D3wFFOjKRPuSYL4iZ_4jr8F13ZoR57Vwa7Q2_MjnmbHYuOte4KoydraGYl-G6pQRaNZEudgroEBpxF3fLYS4u01SvrG1yTwl6a3qdfkhpA%3D%3D)
We also had the opportunity to host Governor Glenn Youngkin at my good friend, Lance Williams’ shop Iron Pig Offroad on Thursday. The Governor asked and answered questions on a range of topics impacting Virginians from cutting cutting taxes & creating jobs to protecting and funding law enforcement officials and veterans. It is a welcome change to have a Governor that recognizes power is with the people, not in centers of government like Richmond.
We’ve been working hard to share our message with as many Virginians in the 7th Congressional District as possible. This week, I went on Newsmax to discuss Biden’s failed energy policy, why we must stop buying Russian oil, and how critically important it is that America becomes energy independent again. You can watch my interview below or click [**HERE!**](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=460143e3403e4846b5f97c894bba83a2&_e=OId47wGuqtAJ2GOH2qZNeduH_jBgiVqvDZqyukZzWeZLIyHGg0IM-54copzUKCuFhNewv4dgVGhXrfrLcghkrYyFoEnTKjU39b9h-KLwPShiZ_fvNQ7S7HnRvJCqSQeiRR07uN-FOTPRDS6Y3yH8sbqpumVMCpz66ZSKbgzYPdmg7MGbfbiPS7KDXdGo4fDU8iO4LRWhql5yW5mSrqwHHIQbRYayuuTC_BTj7QTKQrPGhTTQ0ruNKUm4OHeNJLBnwHairW1Ohmin_yrYFvP07he5IoTkpN8GCqBZU4QyWCP2dh4AksdHsT1dQlyFxA_QbvHLKOXynRLlnuschieLUPYDbU9KcLlgSDPOBniDpqM%3D) [](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=460143e3403e4846b5f97c894bba83a2&_e=OId47wGuqtAJ2GOH2qZNeduH_jBgiVqvDZqyukZzWeZLIyHGg0IM-54copzUKCuFhNewv4dgVGhXrfrLcghkrYyFoEnTKjU39b9h-KLwPShiZ_fvNQ7S7HnRvJCqSQeizSpBjfMcIR992s_vFyY6wJJyePASu1539vK09yBqqHwKIHdtTMc9g4Bym4WWVye8e0cyiO__ctjLKHgxFTnEBm2KANJ_4lR92Uhr6Wce2P-WVmCbtimviYsbnuQIXh1JT-1gXGDkL4j_AD9odKJV9uRJHqdlaH352DeLP5JunPWKcviLBukwDTjhfeV7_1sRTDLaO8ie-8dfyicBZXgicRr57hOvicWU3RfPkvG-_cw%3D)
We also kicked off our first coalition, Veterans for Vega. My close friend and mentor Sergio de la Peña is serving as the chairman of this veterans coalition and I’m so excited to have him on our team.
Friend, we’ve got a long way to go until November, but our momentum is building every day and we won’t stop putting the pressure on Abigail Spanberger. She knows her time as a Congresswoman is coming to an end and I’m going to be the conservative candidate in this race that defeats her.

Thank you so much for your support, and please don’t hesitate to reach out to us if you’d to join our movement or have any questions.

Have a great Sunday,

Yesli Vega
_Conservative Republican for Congress_
_Virginia's 7th District_
| [**DONATE NOW** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=460143e3403e4846b5f97c894bba83a2&_e=OId47wGuqtAJ2GOH2qZNeZcHxCJfAYAsyTnfIODmjcCQE1lAkg8Vwiccf9u5gd9U4OnGKduosorkm7JMZKcLK8CbtzAnswUZNqcdcf9EWBYNrXxejFs4ns8I7vt-236tMatOd9w3fW9Tbcdfv5nmuNltaddQXdpUQd5rMbfyQPWA5MhM1AdOwoKEX5Q3TtoXVEt0a2u5swHzXkFo27wr3uiMrXsa0o5NcAjFtd9tFpvCr4niwHEVm9TgGxAUB3TnbvkPee26sr5Xe5zweD6eX6vNgrhIeh5Ywh_UENDpdvZeKMVYeXT_35bHIMCSaDIlIKvT5wFkETdIIRJ7OwlmAg8Ia6pzGt1O7NW3K0xmY-cykrddNoT0FfLwHlGezOXf9hquL20kl_GOSqOIbgmYHXXmdL1H4C7G78FkhIkAIyqgn5l3HDfd43-7dK8DbidIBUIiK1c_MhS2spRR7rCf9j6nAocoMgbF-BZto0DGJsMiuBi8wH2CP1Yh-wQYw5G_)

body:
Take just a moment to share your opinion >>>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/a2be48026d29/poll-do-you-feel-more-safe-or-less-safe?e=daf3f68050)
https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/redirect_poll_safer?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_poll-safer_20220303&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=poll-safer&utm_agency=PG
Peter,

The real-world consequences of far-left “leadership” in Washington and Democrat-run states and cities have been devastating.

It’s undeniable that the last year has been a DISASTER for the American people.

On Day One of his presidency Joe Biden threw open the border, spurring a massive wave of illegal immigration into our country and pouring fuel on the fire of the opioid crisis.

And the “Defund the Police” insanity we’ve seen take hold has emboldened dangerous criminals and resulted in a record-shattering nationwide violent crime wave... homicides in Atlanta hit a 30-year high in 2021.

Today, want to hear from you.

Do you feel more or less safe than you did a year ago?
https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/redirect_poll_safer?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_poll-safer_20220303&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=poll-safer&utm_agency=PG
Thank you for taking a moment to respond.

- Jennifer Strahan for Congress

P.S. Please consider making a special contribution today. Fuel our fight to win, derail the Democrats’ disastrous agenda, and keep our communities SAFE. Tap or click to pitch in >>> (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/redirect_poll_safer?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_poll-safer_20220303&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=poll-safer&utm_agency=PG)
